name: National Democratic Training Committee
subject: (Don’t Forget) Friday’s Trainer Talk!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee, TrainDemocrats
body:
| will we see you there? 👀
---
[ ](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..jSDJxiQ_WE2NWhxy7mX7aI2-AkfwdGfAGXEnKQv8xE0)
Peter — We have some exciting news to tell you: We’re hosting [**_Trainer Talks: Implementing your GOTV Plan_**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..nQhR8GAQAF12Qvk4ODFnhFWqweDMjvovMuCGEo1Oaac) on Friday, August 27 at 1pm ET! That’s right — our Trainer Talks series is back for another installment. And we want YOU to be there as _three_ NDTC trainers share their GOTV experiences and expertise. [**RSVP now to save your spot at _Trainer Talks: Implementing your GOTV Plan_ on Friday, August 27, 1pm ET.**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..o15Ie65-_Hb-hm5e-jDxfPgwVe4tN4PkZbgvfbrvYYc) | [RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..AvOY8McxmaNOmVvqSADg8Mu-L5J1l70H-kiNES3MODs)
---
When every Democratic campaign is running a top-notch GOTV operation, _we all win._ So whether you’re a seasoned pro or a political newcomer, this training is for you.
[**Join us on Friday, August 27 at 1pm ET to make sure you’re ready to put your GOTV plan into action!**](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..z5f_cVTxDsTdWtnOlI5cnaFpQYklZ5NbnASwPVLiEPg)
[RSVP NOW →](https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..CdcxiBMNJAefMig6P1LulPfxK62QfWhHFlwTt401VSY)
---

See you there!
— NDTC

name: Tim Ryan
subject: About to lose my damn voice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
| | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xhiwd91rIHXO6r30yFG3fKcbS_rvXr4NjXLJeOl1u4ZrzbAtXDvdayE-bOWPRNcOafF3Pbo7ndUOymXooKwkb72IgnlD3wzBueXZD5tkZ4ffBVFRYvmwm-f3jKcKHWq7uLlQwnA7ojLolTGobdxv9En32DFJFITVpG-dd3E14nbiltqqZgaX4l7uQO09TK5ms9AsnVwpu8EjLBGczRT1--MG37Tr9JZraasdINPzQaIg29gkhwINycXEuAjKgl4T6h5ps_pYC4Rsdku3oTbgmWHMjqnR1ENVHpj87LxgMjT0/3ep/zmMHDe7ORYWdn40IwKdvUw/h0/JuqIvX81ciQTjAlxLzbSeoWXlu-oFzxTZ6S5ZjfloHs)
Derek, I need your help to send a message. Because frankly, I’m about to lose my damn voice!

I’ve been making headlines lately for getting a little riled up -- okay, for outright shouting -- at my GOP colleagues on the House floor.

Because when it comes to speaking up for our workers and our democracy, I’m never going to hold my tongue. But our campaign’s deadline is tomorrow night, and I need YOUR help to let the country know that I’m not standing on my own.

[**Our fundraising numbers need to show that I’ve got a grassroots army behind me ready to flip this Senate seat so that we can start getting big things done for the American people. So Derek, will you split a few bucks between my campaign and Common Good VA to help us reach our critical goal before the clock runs out?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xhiwd91rIHXO6r30yFG3fKcCopBBi-5sEWTE-e3TF7suuZOZh9wo1gualNc9paaFkDNtkOyXRKONLxtOgZ8NsiS5KAbNrdAA5sGB7pLj1zYDM_PykFgSCiV3NoB0mZs6ua5kX9NC7eQxsyrqlpkR3uVKPe0Ko1z6_xL2ytkHbQgZ_W7NE-61OT1-ul8XXNvnAmovSsEvrHQwpz47ImE-vtphVGpXioBYE1socXlR1GoepiSqcSGf5iZte5iF9vBKJ2_jHaVCUVVFJVmnoALno9_2aIKoLP7rS2yDQ-_KrW5I/3ep/zmMHDe7ORYWdn40IwKdvUw/h1/XuuuodwI4AJPkB_WvnOGFhQJTO5dmNhrJXXAeuKYFWY) | [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miR52QTPVchffOIVLtW8o7Xhiwd91rIHXO6r30yFG3fKc9CudUXtKenke8wYRqksrVQLq3H01uKUy-IXk4FNXIpjvR1mkVS17VCcZj0x5CyS1qgRuHVoSnLg2NKfjyPqyMPe_mSvHlbHdo2eWXQ-mUZhPUwTbS23q1qKqTJQc1ypGVlyATpjkrn1MCWgCNBp8WMZXcrxNMBWZaxJgPLuzu-iGxlJW_7VBy2EMpNoiTqU4l1vwes2NTwg7hNh139QNuS5aRoMwCsBbfSa4XAX_xWT3QBK6SxA-UPq44xX1vZiq8eYtFnawoZRgfWFQyrkZy/3ep/zmMHDe7ORYWdn40IwKdvUw/h2/8LTnexuYAOsEfKP2B-X7sQYxNtJAbndiRCkhR5k8eR0)

In the age of Citizens United, money talks. But together, we’re gonna show the pundits and the national Republicans watching this race that we’ve got a winning team that’s ready to see this thing through to the end.

Thank you,

Tim

name: Team Janani
subject: Thank you for joining us!
body:
Thank you for joining Janani's fight to deliver real progressive change for Californians!

Janani is running for State Assembly in District 18 because of the unprecedented challenges of COVID-19, and worsening income inequality, environmental catastrophes, and racial injustices. These problems demand a fresh perspective from a leader who has been working directly with her communities for years.

California doesn’t need just another Democrat in Sacramento – **we need a bold advocate who isn’t bought by corporate interest groups and who will deliver real progressive change for Californians**.

You can help our campaign even more by **[making a contribution](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jananiramachandranforassembly2022) **and adding us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/jananiforca), [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/jananiforca/), [Twitter](https://twitter.com/JananiforCA) **and **[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/janani-ramachandran-a2447843/). **

–Team Janani

name: Catalina Lauf
subject: Tucker vs. Kinzinger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Catalina for Congress |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172679:JHq_oRlVN:m:1:3253819041:515518B35511DD558A68E33E7307F383:r) | |
---
Peter,

With Afghanistan in shambles and Leftists across America trampling our freedoms, "Republican" Adam Kinzinger decided it was finally time to act.

And he stood up for the people he represents by attacking the biggest threat to America... Tucker Carlson???

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172679:JHq_oRlVN:m:1:3253819041:515518B35511DD558A68E33E7307F383:r)

_What on EARTH is he thinking?!_

I don't know about you, Peter, but when it's time to choose between Crying Adam Kinzinger and Tucker Carlson, I'm Team Tucker all the way.

**That 's why I'm running as an unapologetic MAGA conservative against Rep. Adam Kinzinger (RINO-IL). It's time to finally get this clown out of office.**

My name is Catalina Lauf. I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants, I'm a former Trump administration official, and unlike too many establishment elites in Washington who have a R by their name, I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican.

**But honestly, what does 'Republican' even mean anymore? Representatives like Adam Kinzinger don't have a _damn clue_.**

Despite using the word over and over again on the campaign trail to get elected in the heartland of Illinois, Kinzinger has been anything BUT a Republican in Washington.

In fact, it seems like Adam is trying harder for a job at CNN than he's trying to work for our party.

He's gone all in with the fake news. _Total Trump Derangement Syndrome._
* _He joined the Democrat witch hunt and voted to IMPEACH President Trump!_
* _He worked with Nancy Pelosi and Liz Cheney to establish a January 6th commission._
* _He attacks conservative leaders like Jim Jordan, Rand Paul, and Ted Cruz whenever they stand up to the bureaucratic nightmare in Washington._

Here's MY reaction to THAT:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172679:JHq_oRlVN:m:1:3253819041:515518B35511DD558A68E33E7307F383:r)

Illinois deserves better than a CNN wannabe who throws his constituents and our President under the bus every chance he gets to grandstand on tv.

His dramatic displays are doing the dirty work for Democrats every step of the way - maybe you saw him break down in tears during that CIRCUS of a hearing?

**After that performance, it 's safe to say Adam Kinzinger should be kicked out of Washington and sent straight to Hollywood.**
[**I AGREE: KICK KINZINGER OUT >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172679:JHq_oRlVN:m:1:3253819041:515518B35511DD558A68E33E7307F383:r)
This rogue 'Republican' is making a complete mockery of the voters who elected him to Congress in the first place.

That's why I'm going to primary him. And I'm going to need your help to do it.

**Despite my opponent 's weak-kneed nature, he won't be so simple to beat.** Liberal Democrats and the fake news media don't want Adam Kinzinger to lose. _He 's working for them, after all._

**And while the left rallies for Kinzinger, they 're going to RUN from me. I'm their worst nightmare:**
* I'm the daughter of LEGAL immigrants
* I'll fight for the America First agenda
* I'm **ACTUALLY** a Republican!

That means Kinzinger will be backed by the DNC and the deep-pocketed machine of Never Trump elites in 2022.

If we're going to beat them, I need your support in this fight.

**[> > Donate to our campaign today and JOIN ME in this race. <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172679:JHq_oRlVN:m:1:3253819041:515518B35511DD558A68E33E7307F383:r)**

Peter, we can't let Rep. Kinzinger and other RINOs across the country continue to masquerade as Republicans while they do nothing to fight the liberal agenda destroying our nation.

Illinoisians need a representative who will fight for America... and I believe I'm that fighter.

As an appointed member of the Trump administration, I fought for small businesses in the Department of Commerce. As a liberty-driven Republican, I believe we need **TERM LIMITS** in Congress. And as the daughter of parents who fled communism, I know the harsh realities of the socialist agenda.

**As your member of Congress, I 'll represent our American values in D.C. - not trash them on cable news for 15 minutes of fame.**

I'm in this thing to WIN. Let's stand up and BEAT the globalist, anti-Trump, anti-freedom RINOs in Congress and strengthen our America First agenda together.

[**RUSH A DONATION TO MY CAMPAIGN
**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172679:JHq_oRlVN:m:1:3253819041:515518B35511DD558A68E33E7307F383:r)
Thank you,
Catalina Lauf
---

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Stop the Insanity!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
Peter, Our schools have been converted into indoctrination centers. Here's proof. Laura Morris has been a public-school teacher for 10 years. She has always loved her students and been a dedicated mentor and educator to them. Recently, the Super Intendent for her school district demanded that she spread his radical propaganda... Like Critical Race Theory (CRT). **The Superintendent even asked her colleagues to turn her in if she privately disagreed with his CRT agenda.** That's why earlier this month, after dedicating her entire life to her students, Mrs. Morris tearfully resigned in front of the school board: "I quit your policies, I quit your training, and I quit being a cog in a machine that tells me to push highly politicized agendas to our most vulnerable constituents - children." [**The 1776 Project PAC is an organization dedicated to shutting down CRT, and kicking these radical leftists of our local school boards. Will you send in $35 dollars today to remove and replace radical school board members?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172726:63jBVRlNZ:m:1:3253819041:CF753CDB0A1B973D33A9AA2B567E2C0F:r) Because Mrs. Morris's story isn't the only one that has come out of public schools in the last couple of weeks... Kila Mosey, a black mother from Atlanta, GA, discovered that the principal of her school had separated kids into "white classes" and "black classes." But friend, it gets worse... Nicole Solas, a Rhode Island mom, demanded that her school district disclosed whether they were forcing CRT on students. When she kept demanding answers, the Teacher's Union SUED HER to intimidate her. They're shameless. They don't think we have a right to decide what our kids are being taught, and they'll do anything to stop you from having a say. [**This insanity will never end unless we stand up. Every day we don 't act we lose another member of the next generation. We simply cannot afford to wait. Will you send in your $35 donation to shut down these radical leftists and stop CRT TODAY?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172726:63jBVRlNZ:m:1:3253819041:CF753CDB0A1B973D33A9AA2B567E2C0F:r) But let me step back and introduce myself. My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I'm the founder of the 1776 Project PAC. My vision for this organization is to send the radical left packing and fill our nation's school boards with America-loving patriots. Already, concerned citizens just like you have contributed thousands to shut down CRT by removing and replacing left wing extremists. [**But if we are going to be successful on a national scale, we need your help today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172726:63jBVRlNZ:m:1:3253819041:CF753CDB0A1B973D33A9AA2B567E2C0F:r) You see, when you contribute to 1776 Project PAC, your dollar does more to impact the future of our country than it could anywhere else. Each school board race that we're targeting will cost between $10,000-$20,000 to win. That's pennies on the dollar compared to the average Congressional race. And what's worse is that most politicians in D.C. do nothing but grandstand without ever achieving anything for their constituents. **Every dollar that the 1776 Project PAC receives is a highly effective investment into the future of our country because we fund the races of people who have a direct say over what students are learning in YOUR hometown.****** By removing and replacing anti-American leftists from school board you're ensuring we don't raise a generation that **hates America and hates one another based on the color of their skin.** [**Will you chip in $35 today to help us save our kids, and our nation 's future from CRT?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172726:63jBVRlNZ:m:1:3253819041:CF753CDB0A1B973D33A9AA2B567E2C0F:r) Thank you in advance, P.S. I grew up in a country that taught me to love others, regardless of the color of their skin, their religion, or their political views. But our nation's kids are being taught something entirely different. They're being taught that all white people are racist, and that all black people are victims. I'm not just heartbroken at what the left is doing. I'm infuriated by it. [**Will you rush in $35 today to help the 1776 Project PAC end the insanity by firing from CRT radicals from local schoolboards?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172726:63jBVRlNZ:m:1:3253819041:CF753CDB0A1B973D33A9AA2B567E2C0F:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172726:63jBVRlNZ:m:1:3253819041:CF753CDB0A1B973D33A9AA2B567E2C0F:r) **[Please consider making a critical donation to the 1776 Project PAC today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172727:63jBVRlNZ:m:1:3253819041:CF753CDB0A1B973D33A9AA2B567E2C0F:r)** Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: Larry Elder | Recall Newsom
subject: Voting has begun!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LARRY ELDER BALLOT MEASURE COMMITTEE RECALL NEWSOM
body:
Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled. | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172742:6xcJIRlxN:m:1:3253819041:36209CBCB80810D822EFA6785A86826E:r)

---
**URGENT: Voting by mail is underway and the deadline to return your ballots is less than 30 DAYS away.**

[**Peter, we need your help reaching as many voters as possible before they mail in their ballot, so we can be sure they vote YES on the recall question. Can we count on you to send in $10, $20, $30 so we can fund our get-out-the-vote efforts in this final stretch?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172742:6xcJIRlxN:m:1:3253819041:36209CBCB80810D822EFA6785A86826E:r)

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172742:6xcJIRlxN:m:1:3253819041:36209CBCB80810D822EFA6785A86826E:r)
The latest polls are showing that this recall is neck and neck, and we need you to help us reach and sway voters before they turn-in their ballots. It's imperative to the future of California that we make sure to get as many recall ballots returned as possible, but we can't do it without you.

Simply put, this is crunch time and everybody in the state should have received their ballots in the mail. Voting has begun and we need to ensure we have done everything we possibly can to make Gavin Newsom the second Governor in California history to be recalled.

[**Help us show Gavin that this recall isn 't a partisan effort, this is from Californians of all backgrounds . . . we're tired of his failed attempt at leadership, are you?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172742:6xcJIRlxN:m:1:3253819041:36209CBCB80810D822EFA6785A86826E:r)

Thank you,

Lou Barnett
Campaign Manager
Larry Elder Recall Newsom Ballot Committee

[**JOIN LARRY ELDER'S COMMITTEE
TO RECALL GAVIN NEWSOM -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172742:6xcJIRlxN:m:1:3253819041:36209CBCB80810D822EFA6785A86826E:r)

---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: We're suing Twitter and we need your help
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) Dear Peter, I'm not going to beat around the bush... we are living in a dystopian, tyrannical state. My team at the Center for American Liberty has recently uncovered evidence of powerful elected politicians colluding with Big Tech corporations like Facebook and Twitter to de-platform and silence conservatives like you and me. **In other words, we 've caught big government using tax-payer funding to silence their political opponents.** And if someone does not immediately stand up against this, the freedoms enshrined in our Constitution will become nothing more than meaningless words on a piece of paper. That's why we launched a lawsuit against Twitter, U.S. Senator Alex Padilla, and a handful of liberal elected officials for their state-sponsored plot to eliminate our First Amendment liberties - _and we need your help to win._ **[Will you join us in our lawsuit against Twitter and Sen. Padilla and help defend the First Amendment?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r)** Let me explain... Like millions of Americans after the 2020 presidential election, conservative activist Rogan O'Handley took to Twitter to express his concerns about the dubious election procedures and skepticism of the results. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) Shortly after the election, many of Rogan's tweets were removed by Twitter and his account was permanently suspended for "violating the government's rules about election integrity." _Hopefully, I don 't need to explain to you that censoring or de-platforming ANY American for their political beliefs or opinions is a gross violation of the First Amendment. _ But it gets much worse... When Rogan tried to figure out why he was censored, he found that bureaucrats working for then-California Secretary of State, Alex Padilla, had explicitly instructed officials at Twitter to silence him. You see, Alex Padilla was being considered to fill Kamala Harris' vacated seat in the U.S. Senate - and he was afraid that Rogan's tweets would hurt his image and chances of being appointed. **So, the office of Alex Padilla immediately instructed his press secretary to contact Twitter and shut Rogan up.** **From:** California Secretary of State Communications Department **To:** Twitter **Date:** Tuesday, November 17th, 2020 at 12:31 PM Hi, We wanted to flag this Twitter post: [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) From user @DC_Draino. In this post user claims California of being a culprit of voter fraud, and ignores the fact that we do audit votes. This is a blatant disregard to how our voting process works and creates disinformation and distrust among the general public. Twitter then flagged the post as misinformation, deleted it, and -- a few weeks later -- permanently banned Rogan from the their site. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) That's why my team and I at the Center for America Liberty are suing Twitter, now-Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber, and a handful of other liberals for their involvement in this blatant assault on the First Amendment. But the only way we can take on the deep pockets and deep connections of these tyrants is with the help of patriotic Americans like you. [**Will you help us fund this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of just $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon. Two years ago, I founded the Center for American Liberty with the purpose of protecting our First Amendment freedoms and civil liberties from being destroyed by today's left. We've taken on Governor Gavin Newsom in California when he unconstitutionally shut down small businesses, banned people from going to church, and kept millions of children locked up in their homes--out of school--during the pandemic. We've taken on Antifa for viciously assaulting and nearly killing journalist Ando Ngo who exposed Antifa's vile, anarchic plot to destroy the United States and turn it into a socialist utopia. **And now, we 're taking on Twitter, Sen. Alex Padilla, and others for colluding to eliminate Rogan O'Handley's freedom of speech. ** But as a non-profit organization, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is with the generous help of like-minded conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000. _After all, we are taking a multi-billion-dollar company, the state of California, and a handful of well-connected politicians._ [**So, can I count on you to help us stand up to Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) I'm not exaggerating when I say that this is the legal battle that will define our generation - and the future of our country. Will we sit back and allow elitist politicians, billion-dollar corporations, and faceless government agencies to continue to trample our constitutional freedoms? Or will we prove that WE, the American people, are still in control of our own lives? [**Please join us in this critical fight to defend the First Amendment by contributing $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) Sincerely, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. For four years, leftist politicians and mainstream media figures would not let go of the bogus and unproven accusation that President Trump colluded with Russia to "steal" the 2016 election. But now that there is clear evidence that a California elected official colluded with big tech to censor conservatives who wanted to comment on the 2020 election those same leftists are dead-silent. I am absolutely fed up with left's hypocrisy, double-standards, and blatantly unconstitutional behavior. [**That 's why I'm urgently asking you to contribute $25, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty to help us fund our lawsuit against Twitter and Senator Alex Padilla. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172784:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58172785:JhX-vRlN9:m:1:3253819041:E43EB086B1B830748EC4BC8822667509:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: I’m running for Governor of Tennessee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
I’m reaching out to you today to announce not my but our campaign for Governor. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34510096/302187440/1656728358?refcode=fl-email-pt-20210823launch1-djm-full-xx-hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA5YTI0Zi0wZTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xs92CUaMAdN8rR0JgBPo41e7qdHJIKZ07Bz1pgTu2F0=&emci=29d96404-f801-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1d09a24f-0e04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9304149)
---
Peter, I’m Dr. Jason Martin, a father, husband, doctor, business owner, and advocate for Tennesseans. Some of you have met me personally in the halls or waiting rooms of hospitals as I have cared for you or your loved ones in my ICUs. Some of you have probably seen me on your nightly news urging our elected officials to take the necessary steps to save lives in Tennessee. Some of you are my family, friends, and neighbors. And some of you may not know me at all! **I’m reaching out to you today to announce not my but _our_ campaign for Governor, because now is the time for a leader in Tennessee to stop the division and start working to meet all of our needs. **And yes, I said _our_ campaign, because unlike most politicians, this campaign is not about my personal fame or popularity — our campaign is a collective movement for the people of Tennessee to reclaim what is ours. **[I’m running for Governor of Tennessee because I want to help create a state that puts people first regardless of where they’re from, what they look like, or how they were raised. Will you join me on this journey by adding your name in support of our campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34510098/302187444/1656728358?refcode=fl-email-pt-20210823launch1-djm-full-xx-l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA5YTI0Zi0wZTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xs92CUaMAdN8rR0JgBPo41e7qdHJIKZ07Bz1pgTu2F0=&emci=29d96404-f801-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1d09a24f-0e04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9304149)** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34510099/302187445/1656728358?refcode=fl-email-pt-20210823launch1-djm-full-xx-l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA5YTI0Zi0wZTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xs92CUaMAdN8rR0JgBPo41e7qdHJIKZ07Bz1pgTu2F0=&emci=29d96404-f801-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1d09a24f-0e04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9304149) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34510101/302187447/1656728358?refcode=fl-email-pt-20210823launch1-djm-full-xx-btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA5YTI0Zi0wZTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xs92CUaMAdN8rR0JgBPo41e7qdHJIKZ07Bz1pgTu2F0=&emci=29d96404-f801-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1d09a24f-0e04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9304149)
---
I have been in middle Tennessee for twenty years now, but I was raised in Southern Alabama in a place much like many of our communities in Tennessee. We had the same sweltering summers, spent on front porches, laughing with family, and swatting mosquitoes.
And just like many families in Tennessee, my family raised me through values rooted in hard work, faith, and community. My parents and step-parents worked long hours to give me every opportunity they were never afforded. And while they labored, my many aunts, uncles, and grandparents stepped in to raise me. Because of their sacrifices, we were able to change the story of our family in a single generation. Their hard work afforded me the opportunity to attend the best public schools and earn scholarships to propel me all the way to and through medical school at Vanderbilt University.
From there, I went on to serve those who served our country at Nashville Veteran Affairs Medical Center, train new healthcare professionals at Meharry Medical College, and treat ICU patients at Nashville General Hospital and now Sumner Regional Medical Center.
My experience as a doctor in cities and rural communities has made it abundantly clear to me that Tennessee's health care system is incompetent, our economy isn’t supporting people to afford their families’ needs, and Governor Bill Lee is failing our students.
**And then came the COVID-19 pandemic, throughout which Governor Lee has continued to abandon Tennesseans, fail to rise to the occasion, and refuse to meet the moment.** Rather than leading with policies to keep children in schools, businesses open, and families safe, Lee went on a fringe extreme rampage, firing top COVID officials, eliminating the power for local school boards to protect their vulnerable students by requiring masks, and lying about the protections needed against the virus.
Before the pandemic and unfortunately during the pandemic, our leaders have sown division through culture wars and social issues to distract from the fact they have abandoned us.
**As a critical care physician, I took an oath to “do no harm.” Right now, there are too many politicians out there like Governor Lee doing more harm than good for the people of Tennessee, and I’m running to change that.**
Tennessee once had a reputation for our hospitality, volunteerism, and how we cared for our neighbors. However, for more than a decade now, our corrupt leaders have worked to divide us so that we abandon our values. _That ends today with our campaign._
We can thrive with improved education for ALL Tennesseans.
We can thrive with better healthcare.
We can thrive by growing businesses that strengthen families.
And we can thrive by fortifying rural Tennessee and modernizing our infrastructure.
**Together, Tennessee thrives.**
**[Join me in bringing Tennesseans together and giving our state the leadership it deserves to ensure we all have the opportunity to thrive. Sign up to join our campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34510103/302187450/1656728358?refcode=fl-email-pt-20210823launch1-djm-full-xx-l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZDA5YTI0Zi0wZTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xs92CUaMAdN8rR0JgBPo41e7qdHJIKZ07Bz1pgTu2F0=&emci=29d96404-f801-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=1d09a24f-0e04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=9304149)**
Thanks so much,
Dr. Jason Martin

| | Hi Peter, Senate Democrats have worked tirelessly to put together a record-breaking progressive $3.5 trillion budget for the Democrats' biggest priorities. The greedy Republicans are not happy with that price tag \-- and we're not surprised. What IS shocking, Peter, is that two Senate Democrats \-- Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin \-- have sworn to do all they can to cut vital programs from the bill in an effort to lower the sticker price and garner support from Republicans. Make no mistake, Peter, bipartisanship is a good thing \-- but only when Democrats stand united. By threatening the solidarity of the Democratic party, Sinema and Manchin are effectively risking an historic opportunity to implement progressive policies just to save face with the party of Trump. True progressives stick together, Peter. That's why When Democrats Turn Out has launched an aggressive campaign to turn up the heat on Sinema and Manchin. But we are falling VERY SHORT of this week's fundraising goal \-- and we must reach our goal, or we'll have to scale back our plans to turn up the pressure on Sinema and Manchin. With the Democratic party at risk of fracturing, we need a roll call of our most dedicated supporters so we can join the fight. Please, we're counting on YOUR support to help us pass this crucial legislation with 50 Democratic votes. **[Here's the truth, Peter: When we heard about Sinema's and Manchin's overtures to the GOP, we set a goal to raise $30,000 in one week. The GOP doesn't really want bipartisanship \-- they want to divide Democrats. Take a moment right now to help us show Kyrsten Sinema and Joe Manchin that Democrats need to stick together if we want to make sure the Biden era is defined by principled governance. Chip in whatever you can spare, whether that's $5 or $50, and help us make government work for the people again.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34513631/302199850/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210823_GEN_FDR_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1NGUxZjNjLTE2MDQtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=s0uN4mUg8ja6LZDAtJkxVh288SZuSIJGVsnbXqdnqqo=)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Make no mistake, Peter, bipartisanship is a good thing \-- but only when Democrats stand united. By threatening the solidarity of the Democratic party, Sinema and Manchin are effectively risking an historic opportunity to implement progressive policies just to save face with the party of Trump. True progressives stick together, Peter. That's why When Democrats Turn Out has launched an aggressive campaign to turn up the heat on Sinema and Manchin. In order to protect the people of Florida, it’s clear we must do everything we can to defeat DeSantis and elect Democrats across the state who listen to public health experts and will act to protect us — not put us at more risk. This moment highlights how important our work is here at Build Local Power registering a new generation of voters that will give Democrats a chance to win, both locally and statewide.

Instead of being guided by science and public health experts, DeSantis has held roundtable discussions with people opposed to getting vaccinated and claim that the use of protective face masks is akin to “child abuse.” At the same time, he is selling merchandise on his campaign website that demonizes Dr. Anthony Fauci and mocks the use of protective face masks.

We should be doing everything we can to increase vaccinations and protect children under 12 years of age who are not able to get vaccinated. Instead, DeSantis refuses to promote the vaccines as the Delta variant has taken hold in Florida and is standing in the way of local governments and school boards from enacting needed mask guidelines to protect our students and our communities.

**[Friend, do you have a second to take this quick survey about Gov. clean_body: The highly-contagious Delta variant of COVID-19 is tearing through Florida and the number of new cases and hospitalizations are setting daily records. As students head back to school this month, many in Florida fear that Gov. DeSantis’ war on science and common sense is putting children and our communities at risk. Friend — The highly-contagious Delta variant of COVID-19 is tearing through Florida and the number of new cases and hospitalizations are setting daily records. As students head back to school this month, many in Florida fear that Gov. DeSantis’ war on science and common sense is putting children and our communities at risk. Do you think Gov. Ron DeSantis is doing enough to protect Florida from COVID-19? In order to protect the people of Florida, it’s clear we must do everything we can to defeat DeSantis and elect Democrats across the state who listen to public health experts and will act to protect us — not put us at more risk. This moment highlights how important our work is here at Build Local Power registering a new generation of voters that will give Democrats a chance to win, both locally and statewide. Instead of being guided by science and public health experts, DeSantis has held roundtable discussions with people opposed to getting vaccinated and claim that the use of protective face masks is akin to “child abuse.” At the same time, he is selling merchandise on his campaign website that demonizes Dr. Anthony Fauci and mocks the use of protective face masks. We should be doing everything we can to increase vaccinations and protect children under 12 years of age who are not able to get vaccinated. Instead, DeSantis refuses to promote the vaccines as the Delta variant has taken hold in Florida and is standing in the way of local governments and school boards from enacting needed mask guidelines to protect our students and our communities. Thank you for your time and letting us know how you feel about DeSantis and the COVID-19 crisis in Florida. — Build Local Power PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY BUILD LOCAL POWER Build Local Power PO Box 5073 Sarasota, FL 34277 United States

body:
David believes that it shouldn’t matter if you are from a “red area” or a “blue area” – every resident of the district should feel as though their Congressman is accessible, listens to their problems, and does everything they can to make their constituents’ lives better. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34523145/302226875/-2098736573?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQ4ZmIxZi0yMzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JpFvS13q32VHoz_s05JQS33RzvBorlpAHuSfWelFdk8=&emci=c84c4262-0df6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4448fb1f-2304-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21852952) | Peter, David believes that it shouldn’t matter if you are from a “red area” or a “blue area” – every resident of the district should feel as though their Congressman is accessible, listens to their problems, and does everything they can to make their constituents’ lives better. That’s why we want to ask you at the very beginning of this campaign: What issues are the most important to you and your family right now? _**COVID-19 relief? Healthcare? The environment? The economy? Infrastructure? Something else?**_ | | [LET US KNOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34523146/302226876/167085197?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDg2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDQ4ZmIxZi0yMzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JpFvS13q32VHoz_s05JQS33RzvBorlpAHuSfWelFdk8=&emci=c84c4262-0df6-eb11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4448fb1f-2304-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21852952)

name: Mark Walker
subject: Enough is enough, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Walker4NC
body:
I won’t back down, %%FirstName%%. Read more >>
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/9da769a2c3fae6cf/8358d21baca9210dc3d6b838967d376c/35903) Peter, As I write this email, liberal politicians and so-called “public health officials” in Washington, D.C. are calling for nationwide vaccine and mask mandates. When China first unleashed this pandemic, we had great leadership from President Trump, despite the left doing everything in their power to stop him. And since the beginning, Anthony Fauci and the CDC have flopped back and forth on everything from masks to safety procedures to deadlines. It’s obvious – President Biden and his administration have botched this thing since the beginning, despite being handed the resources, research, and the foundation needed to get it under control by the Trump Administration. The blame rests solely on the left’s shoulders. **But now they want to make your personal health decisions for you. Forget your individual liberties. Forget the Constitution. They want authority over _your_ life**. [**STOP VACCINE MANDATES >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/9da769a2c3fae6cf/231cfd61525eb043c3d6b838967d376c/35903) My team recently sent out a polling email asking if you support vaccine mandates. And my supporters overwhelmingly responded “NO!” But the Democrats continue to push their Big Government power grab on everyday Americans just wanting to live their lives.
And they have the FULL SUPPORT of the mainstream media! Don’t believe me? Just look at the difference in their coverage of Andrew Cuomo and my friend Ron DeSantis to see their dishonesty on full display. One has left his office in disgrace, the other is defending Americans’ freedoms. Enough is enough. It’s time to say “NO” to Fauci, the CDC, and the mainstream media. Peter, if you elect me to the U.S. Senate, I’ll do everything in my power to _STOP vaccine and mask mandates_. And I’ll work every day to protect your right to make your own health decisions. **[Will you chip in $5 or more to help me take the fight to the media establishment and the radical left?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/9da769a2c3fae6cf/50a0ae2f0c5d1cdbc3d6b838967d376c/35903)** Together, we can get the job done and save our freedom. Thanks,
Mark Walker [**DONATE NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/9da769a2c3fae6cf/415a616ab20d525dc3d6b838967d376c/35903) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/9da769a2c3fae6cf/6a889dd00ac1e04ec3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/9da769a2c3fae6cf/911a02645e4dfd4ec3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/9da769a2c3fae6cf/e76a076314ff6255c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/9da769a2c3fae6cf/51a398877271ac59c3d6b838967d376c/35903) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5dffe9cf8697fc0a3a89ac0c84d83476/35903/9da769a2c3fae6cf/b4efde50071645f4c3d6b838967d376c/35903)

name: Karen Bass
subject: This recall is a GOP farce
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
Team -- I wanted you to hear it straight from me: I am **against** the Republican-led California gubernatorial recall election. Gavin Newsom has led our state through unprecedented times. **We cannot afford to potentially end up with a governor who doesn 't believe in science or the real impacts of the climate crisis right now. **

A bevy of fringe characters and right-wingers have put themselves on the ballot. These are folks who would rather spread conspiracy theories about Trump and COVID-19 than do what's best for our communities.

I'm saying, "No!"

**[That's why I'm part of California "Women Against the Recall," with my colleague Congresswoman Barbara Lee. We're calling on Californians to vote NO on the recall on September 14. Will you add your name now to stand with us in the fight?](https://act.myngp.com/el/vmEhOye3oFwUxlGRcBD0qgOdR_OuLLdouJeqY8F_LsQ=/oY8VHWpOxhFVfeCpHU8O_cACBXRED_SaDixVl9wEViE=?gpsid=39_132_20213&ms=em21_210823_recall_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210823_recall_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210823_recall_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

Governor Newsom represents the progressive values a majority of Californians believe in. He has supported migrant workers, protected the rights of LGBTQ+ Californians, defended our communities from climate disaster, and helped California weather the COVID-19 crisis.

Recalling the governor would threaten progress in our state and set California back. The health of our children, neighbors, and communities depend on Gov. Newsom's continued leadership.

**[We are leading the effort to stop this costly, un-democratic recall. Join me and countless California women in the work to STOP the recall. Add your name now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/vmEhOye3oFwUxlGRcBD0qgOdR_OuLLdouJeqY8F_LsQ=/oY8VHWpOxhFVfeCpHU8O_cACBXRED_SaDixVl9wEViE=?gpsid=39_132_20213&ms=em21_210823_recall_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210823_recall_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210823_recall_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/vmEhOye3oFwUxlGRcBD0qgOdR_OuLLdouJeqY8F_LsQ=/MyODNSLAJ_LC8INE__CULHr2O0VxscfnJlKh5MuxLtE=?gpsid=39_132_20142&refcode=em21_210823_recall_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210823_recall_adv_gq_act__kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

Derek, right now, things aren’t looking good for Virginia Democrats.

Trump’s hand-picked candidates are threatening to take back Virginia. From the Governor’s office to the statehouse, Trump Republicans all across the Commonwealth are poised to sweep back into power.

body:
A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5f2e4900e4ea4a7fb956d3b556c00ba0&_e=SBtKW5-eAQrU67U-eea4tDRR900eHk5GOizniENAufu-5AWRTUe2rNTsusakuLdtIjYR9kuvH1nPtAD7L5lJd8DFJ_MD2QN9S7EBVOUHa87NmopeRCoKYb0K6eAzfRjwVSM6WbWhomf90xT1oJLrvjf_nHmmkDVR6eVOoD1dOYL21xA_l9wOJ3aKvr061ftIyqLt7r6FVQyvF6SqgtoJmkPTJ-qqQCo0dm5QdGygAuzKabtrDExGS409Lz1_gVSJ9jtNX5eX1PA-eJVSNbDGHGIHXRd5McgfTZZ_XeSrIhmmJQyidEpmQDMondVieW8BKZJGx8aPJSy4cRxWME3eTxF8PF6WN2IDGEs3T650cANbrYS0rJbCg3cdmaVyMVnTWSJxDwS8kTc39qTdYFAXvM7sH3PE90PsVVaKCXghi9LriSCQY-zN_RS2FIjVWEd-C3qic8nI0n3BUOfhiYZ-hw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5f2e4900e4ea4a7fb956d3b556c00ba0&_e=SBtKW5-eAQrU67U-eea4tDRR900eHk5GOizniENAufu-5AWRTUe2rNTsusakuLdtIjYR9kuvH1nPtAD7L5lJd8DFJ_MD2QN9S7EBVOUHa87NmopeRCoKYb0K6eAzfRjwVSM6WbWhomf90xT1oJLrvjf_nHmmkDVR6eVOoD1dOYL21xA_l9wOJ3aKvr061ftIyqLt7r6FVQyvF6SqgtoJmkPTJ-qqQCo0dm5QdGygAuwbILv4jLnY3YcwdAFN24s7AgUPGwF8DR9yvx6eeX76ZxSuAEzPokVj53T2r-h6XXXcH5ygpA7vRm_LeFAKksItOIfWBr4TJGEMuShiBAjKs6ON1J5MEQHEOtCtAEDoKl1fRhCF-ihs-Jtm07LQ8GnWC9CuVkb7PL6MTeE9kYpY0-tebxus0lTPEPk89HlJXurg4h_cen7GoV0pVCwfNPChqNesWYffh3k_564VZKf1IA%3D%3D) I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5f2e4900e4ea4a7fb956d3b556c00ba0&_e=SBtKW5-eAQrU67U-eea4tDRR900eHk5GOizniENAufu-5AWRTUe2rNTsusakuLdtIjYR9kuvH1nPtAD7L5lJd8DFJ_MD2QN9S7EBVOUHa87NmopeRCoKYb0K6eAzfRjwVSM6WbWhomf90xT1oJLrvjf_nHmmkDVR6eVOoD1dOYL21xA_l9wOJ3aKvr061ftIyqLt7r6FVQyvF6SqgtoJmkPTJ-qqQCo0dm5QdGygAuzpIzd2Wzrsavv12idFzZ1j9YxQj7Lns19TPFqPIZ2QjG4RoohZrONQVzBueBNlLxAeMDjFu-P7Pehn0sZpo0sT4gzEbhe1wr5t4qEVUsuUrul6zcxuP4iNRBly-xzFhsrAs5gvk0ZxkVTiVrVRpXEQz9uCmKqn6UK3892IgpkNsCOgSc5Jful7IvDk5I8ufr0Ls9Ehv0VhY5CpgvqlOGMh2bvL_0f15LOdmlMdoCrK6Q%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5f2e4900e4ea4a7fb956d3b556c00ba0&_e=SBtKW5-eAQrU67U-eea4tDRR900eHk5GOizniENAufu-5AWRTUe2rNTsusakuLdtIjYR9kuvH1nPtAD7L5lJd8DFJ_MD2QN9S7EBVOUHa87NmopeRCoKYb0K6eAzfRjwVSM6WbWhomf90xT1oJLrvjf_nHmmkDVR6eVOoD1dOYL21xA_l9wOJ3aKvr061ftIyqLt7r6FVQyvF6SqgtoJmkPTJ-qqQCo0dm5QdGygAuxIYjMx4uLNha0sH9OfbcZpcCXGIlQKUK2n_tJyJdy8kHHop40ORulSDeh8KeY95GXgUfTGwbzWp5J1LIcJrrMjBo55hwVxwy0_EkcajRR0qNgTXcfXtCQfaX2u9ZsjMR4I0PA07wnAmzyBQfGhQ_mtv95-CtjiM027t4cEPF7WSIOueeuMhMtfSozW2z3ghgbNifW72JLmVOT38ajh4eraodkMQ-xvKEDG64ML-aJL0A%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. clean_body: A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Fellow Conservative, Like so many Americans, I am watching the scenes coming out of Afghanistan with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes... August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Fellow Conservative - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Fellow Conservative and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. clean_body: Can he count on you? | This is serious, Peter. President Trump just held a HUGE Save America Rally in the Battleground State of Alabama, and it’s clear that he’s 100% committed to winning back the Senate Majority. Republicans are facing must-win races in states like Florida, New Hampshire, and South Carolina, and the only way we can win is if we rally behind President Trump and SAVE AMERICA. The question is: can we count on you, Peter? | | | | | | Momentum is on our side, but there’s a long way until Election Day, Peter. But without the unified support of Grassroots Republicans like you, we’re sure to fall short of victory. | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: MondaireforCongress.com
subject: Mondaire’s primary challenger

body:
#

We’re getting closer and closer to the end of the quarter every day — and when we hit the fourth quarter of 2021, we’re going to have to start seriously preparing for the possibility that Mondaire will have a primary challenge.
Raising money to prepare for this possibility early is important for two reasons:
1. Posting strong fundraising numbers will show everyone the strength of our movement, and could dissuade potential corporate-backed opponents from jumping into this race — but even if they do:
2. We’ll have the funds needed to go up against anyone who challenges Mondaire and win.

But the truth is that we won’t be able to do that if we don’t see a huge uptick in our fundraising in the coming weeks. We also know, since New York is poised to lose a seat in redistricting, Mondaire’s district will look different. So, please:
**If you can, pitch in $3, or any amount you can afford, to set our team up for success as we get closer and closer to our primary election. You can use the link below to contribute:**
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-aug-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34527757/302246724/-2132173892?refcode2=3cce937f-3004-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210823-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2NlOTM3Zi0zMDA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=25Kb-o821iUs39QyKstXBe7QTwJzARecbVelhhPOPg0=)**
Thank you, as always, for your support. We’ll be in touch again soon.
\- Team Mondaire

clean_body: We’re getting closer and closer to the end of the quarter every day — and when we hit the fourth quarter of 2021, we’re going to have to start seriously preparing for the possibility that Mondaire will have a primary challenge. Raising money to prepare for this possibility early is important for two reasons: 1. Posting strong fundraising numbers will show everyone the strength of our movement, and could dissuade potential corporate-backed opponents from jumping into this race — but even if they do: 2. We’ll have the funds needed to go up against anyone who challenges Mondaire and win. But the truth is that we won’t be able to do that if we don’t see a huge uptick in our fundraising in the coming weeks. We also know, since New York is poised to lose a seat in redistricting, Mondaire’s district will look different. So, please: If you can, pitch in $3, or any amount you can afford, to set our team up for success as we get closer and closer to our primary election. You can use the link below to contribute: = Thank you, as always, for your support. We’ll be in touch again soon. \- Team Mondaire = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress c/o Blue Wave Political Partners 499 S. name: Warner HQ
subject: How we defend our Virginia House of Delegates Majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Senator Warner is personally endorsing Democrats Irene Shin, Briana Sewell, and Michelle Maldonado, and he needs your help to make sure they win this November.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34530106/302255788/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzE1MmNmZi0zNTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0f07Yr_XEvpwLTQvWNqhMCMk5iilljFk24VdiPq0NRQ=&emci=a714c6b2-5800-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=57152cff-3504-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, This November, Democrats have the opportunity to not only defend our majority in Richmond, but also to send some incredible candidates to the Virginia House of Delegates. Senator Warner is personally endorsing Democrats Irene Shin, Briana Sewell, and Michelle Maldonado, and he needs your help to make sure they win this November. **_[Will you split a $5 contribution now to elect these Democratic women in Virginia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34530107/302255789/219140279?refcode=mw_em_210823_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzE1MmNmZi0zNTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0f07Yr_XEvpwLTQvWNqhMCMk5iilljFk24VdiPq0NRQ=)_** **Irene Shin** is the daughter of Korean immigrants and a non-profit director who joined the fight for affordable health care after a tragic cancer diagnosis personally impacted her own family. Irene is running for House of Delegates, 86th District, and she needs our grassroots support. **Briana Sewell** has spent her career fighting for paid leave, child care, elder care, and more. As a former community organizer and current Chief of Staff to the County Chair, Briana is uniquely qualified to serve her constituents when we send her to the House of Delegates, 51st District. **Michelle Maldonado** is a small business owner and military spouse who wants to help her community recover from the pandemic, support teachers and schools, and create a fair economy that works for everyone. So she’s running for House of Delegates, 50th District. These are the kinds of public servants we need fighting for Virginia’s families, Derek. We know we send you a lot of emails talking about why it's so important that we defeat the 147 Republican members of Congress who voted to overturn the 2020 election results, but we wanted to take a moment to share with you how we plan to do it. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34530519/302257166/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM5YjE2ZGMzLTM3MDQtZWMxMS1iNTYzLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QCBtQDmiFJVB4GeVY-CQHAsgImOzkEdXV8T5pKu2pV0=&emci=8be0350b-2d04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=c9b16dc3-3704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) Team,

We know we send you a lot of emails talking about why it's so important that we defeat the 147 Republican members of Congress who voted to overturn the 2020 election results, but we wanted to take a moment to share with you _how_ we plan to do it.

Our attention is focused on the most vulnerable Treason Caucus members -- Republicans in districts or states that we have a real chance at flipping in 2022. It might be an off-year, but we're putting the pressure on them now and laying the groundwork to win in the midterms.

We have plans to run ads in their district, make phone calls, write letters, send emails, and so much more to make sure these elected officials' constituents know their representative is a danger to our democracy. **But reaching voters isn't cheap.**

Every dollar we raise from ads and emails like this goes directly back into our efforts to defeat the Treason Caucus and ensures we can keep the pressure on from now until Election Day. That's why your support is so crucial. We have the plans to win, but we can't put them into action without help from grassroots supporters like you.

name: NextGen America
subject: Tell the House: Pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act
body:
| | | House leadership has strongly endorsed the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, but the stakes are too high to stay quiet. Demand passage now.
---
| [Send message](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34531127/302258927/243853347?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVhODhkYy0zOTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2S06AaOMJmjVfb-pSDTx7TsZV7-0zy0xGoLBYwHNCo=&emci=cd221f2c-0b02-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fea88dc-3904-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) |
|
Friend,
**John Robert Lewis was just 25 years old when he marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama — 600 protestors behind him and a swarm of state troopers blocking him.** That day, Bloody Sunday, John Lewis was prepared to lay down his life to protect the right to vote. Within months, the Voting Rights Act of 1965 became law due to his tenacity.
Last Tuesday, Representative Terri Sewell (D-AL) introduced a transformative voting rights bill that could not have been more aptly named. **The John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021 follows in the footsteps of the civil rights giant, defending our democracy from further attacks by the right-wing majority in the Supreme Court.**
Namely, the bill would override _Shelby County v. Holder_ (2013), the landmark decision that gutted a key provision of the Voting Rights Act of 1965: preclearance. The provision requires that states with a history of racist voting rights violations submit their electoral rules for federal approval before roll out.
**The John Lewis Voting Rights Act would stop targeted voter suppression tactics before they start by requiring preclearance on attempts to:**
* Decrease turnout in young minority voters
* Introduce redistricting laws in racially diverse areas
* Reduce polling place hours
* Reduce polling place locations
* Enact restrictive voter registration and identification laws
* Limit access based on language

**If passed, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act would also reverse a number of other rulings by the highest court that uphold discriminatory voter suppression practices.** With the current 6–3 conservative majority in the Supreme Court, opportunities for voting rights victories in the courts are slim to none.
[**That’s why Congress must rise to the occasion and swiftly get this legislation to President Biden’s desk, so he may sign powerful voting protections into law.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34531128/302258928/-1322230594?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVhODhkYy0zOTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2S06AaOMJmjVfb-pSDTx7TsZV7-0zy0xGoLBYwHNCo=&emci=cd221f2c-0b02-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fea88dc-3904-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34531129/302258929/-2081745481?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVhODhkYy0zOTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2S06AaOMJmjVfb-pSDTx7TsZV7-0zy0xGoLBYwHNCo=&emci=cd221f2c-0b02-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fea88dc-3904-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34531130/302258931/-2081745481?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVhODhkYy0zOTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2S06AaOMJmjVfb-pSDTx7TsZV7-0zy0xGoLBYwHNCo=&emci=cd221f2c-0b02-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fea88dc-3904-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
Representative John Lewis witnessed the atrocities of the Jim Crow-era, yet still he fought relentlessly throughout his career to both acknowledge and move this nation past the most shameful chapters of our history. **He believed the soul of America was worth saving.**
We have the opportunity to honor the late congressman’s legacy and bring us closer to his vision for our democracy — truly free, fair, and for the people.
[**Act now: Urge your House representative to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Act in the upcoming vote.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34531131/302258932/1050422401?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVhODhkYy0zOTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2S06AaOMJmjVfb-pSDTx7TsZV7-0zy0xGoLBYwHNCo=&emci=cd221f2c-0b02-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fea88dc-3904-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172)
[Take action](https://click.everyaction.com/k/34531133/302258933/-515661540?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZmVhODhkYy0zOTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n2S06AaOMJmjVfb-pSDTx7TsZV7-0zy0xGoLBYwHNCo=&emci=cd221f2c-0b02-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=5fea88dc-3904-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=6787172 "Sign up to text")

clean_body: | | | House leadership has strongly endorsed the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, but the stakes are too high to stay quiet. Demand passage now. | | | Friend, John Robert Lewis was just 25 years old when he marched across the Edmund Pettus Bridge in Selma, Alabama — 600 protestors behind him and a swarm of state troopers blocking him. That day, Bloody Sunday, John Lewis was prepared to lay down his life to protect the right to vote. Within months, the Voting Rights Act of 1965 became law due to his tenacity. Last Tuesday, Representative Terri Sewell (D-AL) introduced a transformative voting rights bill that could not have been more aptly named. The John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act of 2021 follows in the footsteps of the civil rights giant, defending our democracy from further attacks by the right-wing majority in the Supreme Court. Namely, the bill would override Shelby County v. Holder (2013), the landmark decision that gutted a key provision of the Voting Rights Act of 1965: preclearance. The provision requires that states with a history of racist voting rights violations submit their electoral rules for federal approval before roll out. The John Lewis Voting Rights Act would stop targeted voter suppression tactics before they start by requiring preclearance on attempts to: Decrease turnout in young minority voters Introduce redistricting laws in racially diverse areas Reduce polling place hours Reduce polling place locations Enact restrictive voter registration and identification laws Limit access based on language If passed, the John Lewis Voting Rights Act would also reverse a number of other rulings by the highest court that uphold discriminatory voter suppression practices. With the current 6–3 conservative majority in the Supreme Court, opportunities for voting rights victories in the courts are slim to none. Representative John Lewis witnessed the atrocities of the Jim Crow-era, yet still he fought relentlessly throughout his career to both acknowledge and move this nation past the most shameful chapters of our history. He believed the soul of America was worth saving. We have the opportunity to honor the late congressman’s legacy and bring us closer to his vision for our democracy — truly free, fair, and for the people. "Sign up to text" Thank you, NextGen America | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

Dr. Martin has been an advocate for policies to make life better for Tennesseans, and has spent years fighting for the health and well being of our state.
After twelve rural hospitals closed in Tennessee, Dr. Martin went on to lead the fight for Tennessee’s healthcare in our rural communities and was confronted with the frightening truth: Tennessee’s leaders were more concerned with cable hits and talking points from Washington than actually improving the lives and livelihoods of Tennessee’s working families.
The COVID-19 pandemic has further exposed and exacerbated the inequity and incompetence of our state’s leadership — so Dr. Martin is running to do something about it.
**By bringing Tennesseans together, Dr. Martin aims to finally address this deadly pandemic, improve our health care and education systems, and create a state where everyone can thrive.**
**[But the only way he can do it is if we come together, and that starts today. | | Derek, this might be shocking to hear, but **the Donald Trump-endorsed Republican candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, is the historical favorite in this election.**

I’ll tell you why, but first, [**_will you rush a contribution to Terry McAuliffe’s campaign so we can counter Glenn Youngkin’s historical advantage in this race?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34531232/302259266/1097049879?refcode=20210823.3_MW_8DB&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWVhODhkYy0zOTA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_Q-zXSmRMlzzG1ZoFycXK9As-2KIZs4gW72ckqe6XJ0=)

Since Joe Biden won last year, _**Glenn Youngkin is favored to win this year.**_

But here’s the good news. The one time Virginia bucked that trend was in 2012, _when Terry McAuliffe was elected for the first time._

It’s going to take a massive grassroots effort to pull this off again, but with your help, I think we can do it.

[**_Believe me when I say this, Derek: Virginia is not a safe blue state. clean_body: This is bad | | | = | | Derek, this might be shocking to hear, but the Donald Trump-endorsed Republican candidate for governor, Glenn Youngkin, is the historical favorite in this election. I’ll tell you why, but first, = Here’s the deal. For decades now, Virginia voters have rebuked the sitting president by electing someone from the opposing party to be their Governor. Case in point, when I was elected Governor, it was right after George W. Bush won the Presidency. Since Joe Biden won last year, Glenn Youngkin is favored to win this year. But here’s the good news. The one time Virginia bucked that trend was in 2012, when Terry McAuliffe was elected for the first time. It’s going to take a massive grassroots effort to pull this off again, but with your help, I think we can do it. = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for being part of history, Mark Warner = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

name: Team Nikki
subject: Momentum
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

This is huge: a new poll shows Nikki LEADING Ron DeSantis in a head-to-head matchup by 8 points.

The same poll showed DeSantis leading by double digits just two months ago. Now, he’s underwater with independents and well behind Nikki in a head-to-head matchup.

Team, today marks one year until the primary election. It’s clear our strategy to defeat DeSantis is working, but we’ll need your help to build a winning campaign over the next year. Click here to chip in now and help us build on this momentum. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-1-year]

We want to give you some more details on this. The same poll shows Marco Rubio with a comfortable lead in the U.S. Senate race, while DeSantis’ support has fallen—even among Republicans.

Our momentum is growing thanks to supporters like you. But DeSantis continues to pull in MILLIONS from Republicans nationwide, and we’ll need all hands on deck to keep the pressure on.

We need your help to defeat DeSantis next year, team, so we hope you can step up with a contribution. Click here to help us continue building a winning campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-1-year]

Thanks!

Team Nikki

name: #teamMia Volunteers
subject: Say Hello to the Single Digit Countdown! #8days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2021, FPPC# 1437973
body:
https://tinyurl.com/JoinTeamMia [https://tinyurl.com/JoinTeamMia]Dear Peter,
After months of being on the campaign trail, there is one thing I know for certain: #teamMia always shows up in full force for our events. From canvassing to phone banking, and special community events, I am constantly reminded of the folks who are working hard to secure our victory in Sacramento.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/officemia.jpg]The groups who showed up this weekend were a true testament to what community action looks like. I am especially humbled to have had the Sheet Metal Workers’ Local 104 out canvassing. They know that as Assemblymember I’ll be a voice for them, and that’s why even after a long work week, they still came out to support the cause. Similarly, I couldn’t go without giving thanks to the many youth that support my campaign! This determined group of young people have had my back since the primary, and it is inspiring to see young folks fight for the future they want!
On the note of community action, I am so proud of the inspirational community leaders who are supporting my run for State Assembly! Leaders from all across the board have come together to support our values – and their endorsements are monumental. Don’t just take my word for it, take a look for yourself: [https://miabonta.com/endorsements#endorsements]
Stacey Abrams – Former Minority Leader Georgia House of Representatives and Voting Rights Activist
Dolores Huerta – Labor and Civil Rights Activist
Shriely Weber – California Secretary of State
California Latino Legislative Caucus
Democratic Legislative Women’s Caucus
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/89949/images/collage.jpg]Without a doubt, #teamMia was delighted to participate in a Back to School Supplies Giveaway hosted by We Lead Ours in Brookdale Park! Ensuring that our students are adequately prepared to learn is top of mind for me, so it was wonderful to see our Oakland community step up for them.
By now, I know the power #teamMia holds – in fact, I’ve seen it time and time again. Your hard work and conviction for the campaign does not go unnoticed. That’s why this weekend was one full of appreciation for our volunteers!
We are down to single digit days. 8 days to be exact, and next week is Election Day! Let’s finish strong!
Yours in Service,
Mia Bonta
Paid for by Mia Bonta for Assembly 2021, FPPC# 1437973
1241 High St, Oakland, CA 94601 | 415-891-9751 | volunteer@miabonta.comhttps://www.facebook.com/miabonta [https://www.facebook.com/miabonta] https://twitter.com/MiaBonta [https://twitter.com/MiaBonta] https://instagram.com/mia.bonta [https://instagram.com/mia.bonta] https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/ [https://www.linkedin.com/in/mialisabonta/]
