August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: Mark, Rubio Campaign Manager
subject: Read then delete, don’t want someone else’s eyes on this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter, below is a memo I sent to our staff this morning. Because you're a valued member of our team, I wanted to make sure you saw it. Please read and then delete.
| To: Marco Rubio for Senate Team
Subject: State of Race 8.23.21
Status: SENSITIVE
Date: _**[8/23/21](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58177587:Jum39RlN1:m:1:3253819041:2515FDFD7D17A540BE3A9E93FDFA411A:r "8/23/21")**_
Time: 8:13 AM
Team -

I'm sure you saw the report circulating about the most recent polling which shows Val Demings almost tied with Marco, only falling 2% short. I'm telling you this to remind you of how tough of a race this is going to be.

Let's look at the scope of the race so far:
* The 2018 Florida Senate race is decided by just 10,000 votes
* Val Demings is hand picked by Nancy Pelosi to lead the Trump Impeachment Circus in 2019
* President Trump gives his endorsement of Marco Rubio for Senate
* Val Demings announces she will challenge Marco and then raised $1 million in only 24 hours
* Val Demings outraised us and ended the quarter with over $4.6 million raised
* Demings has spent $300,000 on Facebook Ads per week targeting critical counties in Florida
* National Dems spent $250,000 on ads this week attacking Marco

Team, this is why we have to pick things up and work harder. The National Democratic movement is highly motivated to take back Florida -- especially now that it's President Trump's home state. They're willing to spend MEGA MONEY to take back the state from Trump. Conservatives won't have a chance at the polls in November if we do not pick up the pace.

__**[Can you start asking donors for $27 donations? Our usual ask is $18, but we really need to ramp things up.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58177588:Jum39RlN1:m:1:3253819041:2515FDFD7D17A540BE3A9E93FDFA411A:r "Can you start asking donors for $27 donations? Our usual ask is $18, but we really need to ramp
things up. ")**__
---

Peter, now that you see the memo do you understand why I'm coming to you today? We need to ramp up our efforts and get some more money in the door if we want even a fighting chance to win in November.

**I put together a private link for you to donate. The settings are set up so Marco can track when you donate. Please do not let him down!**

_**[https://winred.marco-rubio-for-senate.com/emergency-fund?open-for-Peter-Marco-tracking-on](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58177587:Jum39RlN1:m:1:3253819041:2515FDFD7D17A540BE3A9E93FDFA411A:r "https://winred.marco-rubio-for-senate.com/emergency-fund?open-for-Peter-Marco-tracking-on")**_

Thanks for your effort and energy on this, our team desperately needs your help today.

Mark

Miami, FL 33266

name: Josh Harder
subject: My new climate bill
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Harder for Congress
body:
| | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/_AJqa_sra56G9-8C7GwX_SvVqHWpOf8GD4ltswDEH_w=) Peter, Did you see the new climate report that said we're in a "code red for humanity"? It confirmed some of our greatest fears about climate change and what it means for our way of life. But it's not a surprise to my farming community -- we're already feeling the disastrous effects with warming temperatures and longer droughts. I strongly believe if we want to truly get ahead of this crisis and combat climate change, we have to make sure _every_ community is included in the solution -- including our farmers. **That is why I was so proud to introduce my landmark piece of climate legislation: the Future of Agricultural Resiliency and Modernization (FARM) Act.** We brought together environmental groups like the League of Conservation Voters with agricultural leaders like the Almond Alliance to make sure farmers are a part of the climate solution. [**Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of this legislation to help us fight back against climate change?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/_AJqa_sra56G9-8C7GwX_SvVqHWpOf8GD4ltswDEH_w=) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/_AJqa_sra56G9-8C7GwX_SvVqHWpOf8GD4ltswDEH_w=)
---
_I 'll be honest, it wasn't always easy to get this bill written with such a diverse group of stakeholders._ But with a common goal in mind and the same catastrophic climate emergency facing us, we were able to create a comprehensive bill that embraces farming communities like mine as part of the climate solution.
This bill means real action -- providing farmers with critical funding to help alleviate the increasingly severe impacts caused by climate change.**By making sure farmers have the resources they need to reduce greenhouse gas emissions, improve air, water, and soil quality, and enact more sustainable farming practices, we can make a real difference right here at home in the fight to save our planet.**
I'll keep working hard to get this bill through the House and make sure we're tackling climate change head on.**[Will you add your name today as a citizen co-sponsor?](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/_AJqa_sra56G9-8C7GwX_SvVqHWpOf8GD4ltswDEH_w=)**
I'm so grateful to have you with me in this fight. Thanks for your support,
Josh
* * *

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/W-gCn6L1wgwf31jNZYQ79xr5-epPkj_cc18CqLlGmD8=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/c90M5dkm4MVIWUtiOinCWl7i2CgnC0zl_w6tI-zqtFM=)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because CA-10 is one of our nation's most pivotal tossup districts. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click [**here**](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/LDdXce-8PkRe6qWLexoss4qgpP4hJL2E9ZKFyDfBztY=?recipientId=JGP1LIgKX8KYGR8WifkGL1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com) to get only the most important updates, or you can [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/0O9ihBbTNlJ1qZYzk4_zaqlPx27TvuCTqnf2uH5PYwY=) here.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/ayWsHCHU7egRCEKnISqZsfE7CHOyF0Pec6WJv1Zyzjw=?refcode=E10887-20210823-FarmersClimate-SL-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/ayWsHCHU7egRCEKnISqZsfE7CHOyF0Pec6WJv1Zyzjw=?refcode=E10887-20210823-FarmersClimate-SL-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)

Josh and his wife Pam live in Turlock where Josh grew up and delivered newspapers for the Turlock Journal. Josh was re-elected to Congress on behalf of families in the Central Valley where he's fighting to hold our government accountable, pass COVID-19 relief, and deliver on our progressive values. **[Will you help him keep up the fight in Congress by making a contribution today?](https://act.myngp.com/el/sS-hplObINhAX5P-hKfhSZIBBN30id5eg_y2ZK_PpX8=/ayWsHCHU7egRCEKnISqZsfE7CHOyF0Pec6WJv1Zyzjw=?refcode=E10887-20210823-FarmersClimate-SL-EnvironmentClimate-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15)**

Harder for Congress
PO Box 4426
Modesto CA 95352 United States

name: Blake Masters
subject: Mark Kelly is Beatable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blake Masters for Senate**
body:
Mark Kelly is all talk and no action. He promised to be an independent voice for Arizona, but he votes lockstep with Democrats. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=20e981630f6342b18e1223bce880d93d&_e=pkil7oT0gNNIx5odVv3Fm35og5ITU0qoY976Fw897bGnPzLXm4rIJDVt5OI4agY2w7Lk7DeAMI4QpDTM6NdJMhaYAkKtFZLurK3s_04K0TwgKgnBytE3Ufw6tmkwn7F5ka5HvASq0LQQp0-xAK-G9f19U1IhOX-8jozWQS9sX-ldvkHlhymvAlpVLe_vrYzKKa52bkqW-I-gXJWOXQKgzD8tYc4-UzLw5axmLKYVLwlmSZFYf2NDzDZedy93LVklyybMEyIXla6Ofn_R63aRkO3WIhrCl8BqWCVdLpkotfa-AHvlewFnQENjdCffPc6MImXnY-iqm4awLg6dzrqnW0NGAOrl4Doty_FgRz_SVR0jYnsDTKLGYtxo5w3hpTLZy5Y82iGmqmGb94c8nqsLNelIsseuaiKnQ1LLriV-LCqSx4ln0FiwGGYiclS1XSLX)

---
Fellow Conservative,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=20e981630f6342b18e1223bce880d93d&_e=pkil7oT0gNNIx5odVv3Fm35og5ITU0qoY976Fw897bGnPzLXm4rIJDVt5OI4agY2w7Lk7DeAMI4QpDTM6NdJMhaYAkKtFZLurK3s_04K0TwgKgnBytE3Ufw6tmkwn7F5ka5HvASq0LQQp0-xAK-G9f19U1IhOX-8jozWQS9sX-ldvkHlhymvAlpVLe_vrYzKKa52bkqW-I-gXJWOXQKgzD8tYc4-UzLw5axmLKYVLwmXmqT3QlQlaxGfM93ygIzaWj-hb7Fq5zJsZfDoi9Q0kVwhlu0YHnxlyIufUc9OF36f78NwLFbuRP5W7x9v7-7N1_3KMpGxU5lpOK2WpW1yY05LgRTrNqLybi_VLILv_ierHmA5FK-EZW5KYGipCnPJnj2krK5G1Msa30Qe5YUUMRFI1nVyBw3IChait7DWT1iatlAoMXEIofVRI9xicHOe) **Our Arizona Senate Seat was just listed as "likely to flip" in 2022. That's because, unlike in 2020, Mark Kelly has a poor voting record to defend. Even liberal CNN thinks Kelly is vulnerable!**

[**Let me show you why Mark Kelly is beatable because I need your help to defeat him.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=20e981630f6342b18e1223bce880d93d&_e=pkil7oT0gNNIx5odVv3Fm35og5ITU0qoY976Fw897bGnPzLXm4rIJDVt5OI4agY2w7Lk7DeAMI4QpDTM6NdJMhaYAkKtFZLurK3s_04K0TwgKgnBytE3Ufw6tmkwn7F5ka5HvASq0LQQp0-xAK-G9f19U1IhOX-8jozWQS9sX-ldvkHlhymvAlpVLe_vrYzKKa52bkqW-I-gXJWOXQKgzD8tYc4-UzLw5axmLKYVLwnyuNpiX40CyO8CBRwUGrvcp4x2MsM0qSKoI6erHKkOgvHjeZ1GdX7tkm0JSDd9ThBi_9OD_Sy13FHmXbsn3hYACHiEEFIbe3H9wZZKwZv9ZjHCY88StE1J5BPPAr-HU6z0We9r9mGCswptMAOi2S9F4y4341ZNfrtwbw8p6hGZU6JHVDdzd_M2WOJ4M5mDN5DYeluo-CJzCUu-4PHU_prP)

Candidate Mark Kelly told us that he would vote to secure the border in Arizona, but when it came time to keep his word, **he voted to prevent including border wall construction in the infrastructure bill.**

He said he would look out for Arizona workers **but undermined the workforce by supporting an infrastructure bill that creates a pathway to amnesty.**

Unlike much of the junk in the infrastructure bill Mark Kelly supported, having a completed secure border and a legal workforce is literally _"infrastructure."_

**_Kelly is all talk and no action._**

He went to Washington, D.C., and promised to be an independent voice for Arizona, but he votes lockstep with Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats.

When you look at the facts, it’s obvious Mark Kelly is beatable. We need to do everything we can to flip this seat. Fellow Conservative,- I'm going to need you with me, and that's why I'm coming to you today. [**_Can you help me beat Mark Kelly?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=20e981630f6342b18e1223bce880d93d&_e=pkil7oT0gNNIx5odVv3Fm35og5ITU0qoY976Fw897bGnPzLXm4rIJDVt5OI4agY2w7Lk7DeAMI4QpDTM6NdJMhaYAkKtFZLurK3s_04K0TwgKgnBytE3Ufw6tmkwn7F5ka5HvASq0LQQp0-xAK-G9f19U1IhOX-8jozWQS9sX-ldvkHlhymvAlpVLe_vrYzKKa52bkqW-I-gXJWOXQKgzD8tYc4-UzLw5axmLKYVLwngcR-Qy0bkhdSIn8kfCSQj0Yi-CDA9LVlfQQHT2cIVZIwA4o9MFiNMgB0WNnWVI8oJNPxgv4x8xyG1X8WVQRaUOuDIxQ-ay1PJlPk6-u38Nb5tMP7RgfZ_LzgnGeSsv29MNvU__Kxsj72aHZxlV2bUMcGsgQt4tRtw8zp8ytTCd5vJoa3CVG6fyUhXh3eUdEpRVw17y_x5LgZ7gvXvqN0u)

**Our Country needs an outsider to disrupt the status quo that destroys our communities, and Mark Kelly isn't that.** I will be a voice for change in Washington, but I need to know you support me. [**_Will you join my campaign for Senate?_**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=20e981630f6342b18e1223bce880d93d&_e=pkil7oT0gNNIx5odVv3Fm35og5ITU0qoY976Fw897bGnPzLXm4rIJDVt5OI4agY2w7Lk7DeAMI4QpDTM6NdJMhaYAkKtFZLurK3s_04K0TwgKgnBytE3Ufw6tmkwn7F5ka5HvASq0LQQp0-xAK-G9f19U1IhOX-8jozWQS9sX-ldvkHlhymvAlpVLe_vrYzKKa52bkqW-I-gXJWOXQKgzD8tYc4-UzLw5axmLKYVLwnEZVpVrU09RL0U65TYbl3eIKjW3YnT2gEqmA72tslNbvSz_JL9a-vr693KA0f4N-kOcsaK9i_uRizJFq04zw_XNOS7v5aBvkSRJBh4GACZeKYqWn7hZuFYAiC_OUrY4uBSD3JOfVkD7lriZFo77X83LK6TI6QIb0rNDOrCDdr179FCM9SF7NAJiqep-PAjPlSStqldVNkNqK9zr13AAREh)

Thank you,

Blake Masters
Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona

P.S. I can’t beat Mark Kelly without your help. He is one of the Democrats top fundraisers and has millions in the bank to defeat his opposition. [**Our campaign needs the support of folks like you. If you are ready for a disrupter in Washington, will you chip in $15 or more today?

clean_body: Mark Kelly is all talk and no action. He promised to be an independent voice for Arizona, but he votes lockstep with Democrats. | Fellow Conservative, Our Arizona Senate Seat was just listed as "likely to flip" in 2022. That's because, unlike in 2020, Mark Kelly has a poor voting record to defend. Even liberal CNN thinks Kelly is vulnerable! Candidate Mark Kelly told us that he would vote to secure the border in Arizona, but when it came time to keep his word, he voted to prevent including border wall construction in the infrastructure bill. He said he would look out for Arizona workers but undermined the workforce by supporting an infrastructure bill that creates a pathway to amnesty. Unlike much of the junk in the infrastructure bill Mark Kelly supported, having a completed secure border and a legal workforce is literally "infrastructure." Kelly is all talk and no action. He went to Washington, D.C., and promised to be an independent voice for Arizona, but he votes lockstep with Chuck Schumer and Senate Democrats. When you look at the facts, it’s obvious Mark Kelly is beatable. We need to do everything we can to flip this seat. Fellow Conservative,- I'm going to need you with me, and that's why I'm coming to you today. Our Country needs an outsider to disrupt the status quo that destroys our communities, and Mark Kelly isn't that. I will be a voice for change in Washington, but I need to know you support me. Thank you, Blake Masters Republican for U.S. Senate, Arizona P.S. I can’t beat Mark Kelly without your help. name: Ras Smith
subject: Gov. Reynolds has stripped power away from our schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
Team | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34541175/302295720/-858979165?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210823schools_rs_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTBmOGE4Mi01NzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PatbfU4FX-dPPTnQUzmJKxn-z9qqTAt15zAvuqfNLHc=)
---
Team, Many Iowa students are starting school today with a COVID variant that is infecting children at a higher rate than we’ve ever seen. **Yet Governor Kim Reynolds has stripped school districts and local governments from being able to require masks.** I’ve been talking to educators and parents across the state, and they feel confused, scared, and angry. More than anything, they want to protect our kids. Iowans' lives and the health and safety of our children are at risk because we have a Governor who prioritizes her political interests ahead of the people of Iowa. This total lack of leadership was evident when Iowan families filled the lawn outside the capitol to plead with the Governor to let school boards have a say in what’s best for their own communities. But Governor Reynolds vowed to “hold strong” and go to court if needed to fight mask requirements in schools meant to keep our children safe. I strongly believe that no one knows what's best for a community more than the people who live there. Local control is a hallmark of success in Iowa that Governor Reynolds continues to erode. [**Sign our petition to hold Governor Reynolds accountable and support local communities having decision-making power and control over their own school districts.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34541179/302295724/-1330276380?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210823schools_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTBmOGE4Mi01NzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PatbfU4FX-dPPTnQUzmJKxn-z9qqTAt15zAvuqfNLHc=&emci=5f3b8219-4a04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=950f8a82-5704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) | [SIGN OUR PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34541181/302295728/-1330276380?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210823schools_rs_full_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTBmOGE4Mi01NzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PatbfU4FX-dPPTnQUzmJKxn-z9qqTAt15zAvuqfNLHc=&emci=5f3b8219-4a04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=950f8a82-5704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)
---
**And let us not forget the $95 million that Governor Reynolds returned to the federal government that was meant to help our schools in this very situation.** That $95 million was Iowans’ own money that we paid in taxes, coming back to us to invest in our schools and our children. Dollars for testing and COVID mitigation to help keep our students in schools and safe. Our schools that the GOP has already underfunded for over a decade — causing a continual increase in teacher shortages.
_And she sent the money back._ Now, other states are reaping the benefits of Iowans’ hard-earned dollars.
Iowans are demanding restoration of local control across the state, and I echo this demand. But today, I am asking Iowans to call on Governor Reynolds to admit her mistake, reestablish local control over schools, and request the $95 million of Iowa taxpayer dollars be returned to help make our children safer as we embark upon a new school year.
[**Add your name to build public pressure and demand Governor Reynolds does the right thing for our children and communities.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34541184/302295730/-1330276380?refcode=fl_email_pt_20210823schools_rs_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTBmOGE4Mi01NzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PatbfU4FX-dPPTnQUzmJKxn-z9qqTAt15zAvuqfNLHc=&emci=5f3b8219-4a04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=950f8a82-5704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)
Thanks for speaking up alongside me,
Ras

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34541187/302295733/-1395442909?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTBmOGE4Mi01NzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PatbfU4FX-dPPTnQUzmJKxn-z9qqTAt15zAvuqfNLHc=&emci=5f3b8219-4a04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=950f8a82-5704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34541189/302295736/1661814592?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTBmOGE4Mi01NzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PatbfU4FX-dPPTnQUzmJKxn-z9qqTAt15zAvuqfNLHc=&emci=5f3b8219-4a04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=950f8a82-5704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34541191/302295738/283236471?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTBmOGE4Mi01NzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PatbfU4FX-dPPTnQUzmJKxn-z9qqTAt15zAvuqfNLHc=&emci=5f3b8219-4a04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=950f8a82-5704-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21044445)

name: Alex Padilla
subject: Respectfully asking
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
The Senate just took an enormous step this month by passing the $1.2 trillion bipartisan infrastructure package. It is the most extensive investment in our infrastructure our country has seen in decades.
This transformative bill will help create and support millions of jobs and deliver on our promises to rebuild our nation’s infrastructure.
The American people expect Democrats to deliver on our promises and this bill is a down payment on that promise. And as we fight to make sure it gets to the President’s desk, I am respectfully asking for your support, because if this bill is going to pass it’s going to take all of us.
[**So, if you are able, will you pitch in $3 right now to help us continue fighting to pass this major investment in our nation’s infrastructure? This won’t be an easy effort, but if we all come together I have no doubt we will succeed.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/41?source=em210823-1-15&t=1&akid=247%2E159979%2E4pWxef)

I hope you’ll join me today and become a part of this movement for change.
Warmly,

name: Events Team - Laurel Imer for Congress
subject: The Sheriff is on his way to see you.
body:
Join Team Imer as we host Sheriff Mark Lamb and his Wife from Pinal County, AZ.
---

Join Team Imer for Brunch, Mimosas, and Bloody Marys as we visit with Sheriff Mark Lamb and talk about the crisis on the Southern Border where he works every day.
This fundraiser comes on the heels of our 3rd quarter fundraising deadline and we need your help to crush our goal.
Tickets are going fast and there is only a handful of seats remaining. Get your tickets now before there isn't any space left. Select General Admission, Couple General Admission, VIP, Couples VIP, or one of our great ticket packages for this once-in-a-lifetime event at the Dunafon Castle.
More info on Sheriff Mark Lamb: Mark Lamb is the Sheriff of Pinal County Arizona and is a former host of Live PD on A&E. His department was featured on the hit show, 60 Days In, and he has been featured many times on National News outlets. Sheriff Lamb served on the Presidential Advisory Council of Border Sheriffs. He was just re-elected as the Sheriff of Pinal County Arizona and is the new host and owner of The American Sheriff Network. Mark recently released his new book, The American Sheriff, which will be available for purchase at the event.
We hope we can count on your presence on the 26th and we look forward to spending the day with you all!
Sincerely, Events Team Laurel Imer for Congress

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of August 23rd: Health care freedom & election integrity!
body:
| |
---
This week, we must continue to organize protests against unAmerican medical mandates or commit to attend one, and we need to step up to fight H.R. 4, a.k.a. the “Pelosi Power Grab Act.”

**Action items for this week include:**
* Sign up to organize a Just Say No protest or sign waving, or commit to attend one near you
* Save our elections and stop the “Pelosi Power Grab Act”
* Afghanistan Prayer Rally

* Reminders and other sign up forms

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**SIGN UP TO HOST OR ATTEND A “JUST SAY NO” PROTEST!
**
There isn’t a lot of time left to organize a protest/sign waving against the unAmerican medical mandates popping up more and more. Go to [**StopMedicalMandates.com**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjM1LWFhYjM0ZWRjYjE0OTRhOTc5NWM1Nzk0OTE1MjI4NTg5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvc3RvcG1lZGljYWxtYW5kYXRlcy8_bWlkPTQ0MjIyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=h1DP14KcjsynVPEAjv7K0g) to sign up to organize or to let us know you’ll be attending one. We have protests listed on our website for those who have sent us the details.

Just say no to mask mandates. Say no to lockdowns. Say no to forced vaccines. Say YES to freedom and liberty!

**If we don’t stop these mandates now, the tyrants will only be emboldened. Do you want to see how terrifying their next mandates are? I don’t. So, let’s stop them now.**

This week, House Speaker Nancy Pelosi is set to force a vote on H.R. 4 — yet another attempt by Democrats to federalize elections and strip away common-sense election security measures.

Despite a vast majority of Americans supporting common-sense security measures that simply make it easy to vote and hard to cheat, Democrats continue to demonize and fight against them. In fact, a recent poll found that over 80% of voters support voter ID requirements, yet this is one of the main provisions Democrats incessantly attack.

[Why are they fighting against the will of the American people?](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjM1LWFhYjM0ZWRjYjE0OTRhOTc5NWM1Nzk0OTE1MjI4NTg5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90aGVoaWxsLmNvbS9ob21lbmV3cy9jYW1wYWlnbi81NjgzODUtcG9sbC1maW5kcy1ncm93aW5nLXN1cHBvcnQtZm9yLXZvdGVyLWlkLXJlcXVpcmVtZW50cy8_bWlkPTQ0MjIyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=QHxBMA5njgyLjRFmQ5ngKg)
|

**
The House Rules Committee will meet Monday, August 23, 2021 at 11:00 AM EDT, and the “Pelosi Power Grab Act” is on the agenda. **As of right now, the vote is likely to take place TUESDAY EVENING!**

The action you need to take on this will depend on where you live. There are House Republicans to call, if you live in those districts. There are vulnerable Democrat Senators to call, if you live in those states. And finally, there are items to share on social media no matter where you live.

[**See our website**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjM1LWFhYjM0ZWRjYjE0OTRhOTc5NWM1Nzk0OTE1MjI4NTg5%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYWN0aW9ucy9hY3Rpb24taXRlbXMtMjAyMS0wOC0yMy8_bWlkPTQ0MjIyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSNocjQ&K=8MZOO0HB7XRWbLpxb9vHqg) for the full call to action on the “Pelosi Power Grab Act,” including talking points, a sample script for each type of phone call, and the resources to read and share on social media.

But this bill will give unlimited power to Democrats to absolutely control every city, county, and state’s elections. Joe Biden’s embarrassing retreat from Afghanistan was a defining moment for his Presidency. Ignoring intelligence reports, allowing a brutal terrorist organization to quickly take over the country, and then leaving American citizens behind enemy lines. Joe Biden’s Afghanistan retreat was nothing short of a disaster.

Let us be abundantly clear: the Biden Administration deserves 100% of the blame for this failed withdrawal. As President Trump correctly put it: “It’s not that we left Afghanistan. It's the grossly incompetent way we left.”

Grossly incompetent only begins to describe the Biden Administration’s handling of the withdrawal. It’s nothing short of an embarrassment, on a global stage. Joe Biden is not fit to lead, and innocent Americans are paying the price, while the world watches...

Here's the truth, Peter:

Wisconsinites don't want the GOP setting their tax dollars on fire for a sham election audit just because Donald Trump can't handle losing. What folks actually want is clean drinking water, broadband access, good-paying union jobs, and affordable health care.

That shouldn't be too much to ask, but when you're talking to Republicans like Ron Johnson and Robin Vos -- apparently, it is!

While these guys are laser-focused on doing Trump's bidding or enriching their wealthy donors, Sarah is meeting with Wisconsin seniors today to talk about expanding Medicare and lowering prescription drug costs. You know, the real issues people are facing, because that's the kind of leader our state deserves -- not someone who abandons them for Trump.

Peter, Sarah wasn't afraid to take on the Republicans and win statewide -- _twice!_ \-- in the last midterm election. She's not afraid to take on Ron Johnson in this one either. But a successful grassroots campaign requires a mountain of resources and an incredible team of people (like you!) to win.

**[Can we count on you to stand with Sarah Godlewski, help defeat Ron Johnson, and get this Senate seat working for Wisconsin again? Your contribution today will allow us to collect the resources necessary to deliver a new kind of leadership for our workers and families. Chip in today if you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34542389/302299413/-1936136847?gpsid=50_130_20219&refcode=em21_210823_EOM1_fnd_gq_act_aud_TS_ettx_sl2&utm_campaign=em21_210823_EOM1_fnd_gq_act_aud_TS_ettx_sl2&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzFkOWQyOS01YzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pbofJKwSy_VleyYdnLlqqavm3TAYFiZYSMgeVQjT1vw=)**

Thank you,

clean_body: | = Wisconsin Republican promises forensic election audit Assembly Speaker Robin Vos hopped on a private plane to Donald Trump's rally in Alabama to brief the former president on the sham election audit in Wisconsin. We deserve better than the desperate attempts by GOP leaders like Vos and Ron Johnson to soothe one man's fragile ego. Enough is enough. = | = Here's the truth, Peter: Wisconsinites don't want the GOP setting their tax dollars on fire for a sham election audit just because Donald Trump can't handle losing. What folks actually want is clean drinking water, broadband access, good-paying union jobs, and affordable health care. That shouldn't be too much to ask, but when you're talking to Republicans like Ron Johnson and Robin Vos -- apparently, it is! While these guys are laser-focused on doing Trump's bidding or enriching their wealthy donors, Sarah is meeting with Wisconsin seniors today to talk about expanding Medicare and lowering prescription drug costs. You know, the real issues people are facing, because that's the kind of leader our state deserves -- not someone who abandons them for Trump. Peter, Sarah wasn't afraid to take on the Republicans and win statewide -- twice! \-- in the last midterm election. She's not afraid to take on Ron Johnson in this one either. But a successful grassroots campaign requires a mountain of resources and an incredible team of people (like you!) to win. = Thank you, Team Sarah Sarah is fighting for you, not the top 1% -- that's why she's not accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. If you're ready to step up and join this grassroots team, make a contribution today. | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

Fellow American,

Recently, my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly,**[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7ccbcd73245a4122b64ac1188677c5cb&_e=pwBPVLgoe5s76qz4BNH0vdeSeecNg7Fy5tknqWHZqHeyoAbu4DbTIJ19lsnJXmwSgqmiUwmcKiEt-uo8HcBRGTFSRKxpvJelhTFjTD7OfwPaJuGTdPxaXKyzA3xVhMWlYstYD7KhFY0-LOoHF-TujAOgmrKa1xxmWea5geYpVCdlGzDbEBvwGE4eCWjpoSkJt87oB7dj0loQSi-3KCUwe5AD8HKwx2s5b9fwxaB94uYxTKf1YMEwO1zCaZ3uQunsey-4BAswrEgOtjHa698T4gZsPD-u_tU4JxX8dgY2X1bgISxbFgFSxq9egGvAnvoIJ5a-V2SG3tVbpqDaJScmew-MIoadvnK7xrNFeb0f2DcHlGluecRXZQvABKuzmWR4vyqenjDBQsRbpc-4RgqTRrdW6jfERyhyS1V1ZZei3_49fYiClmsqPcVCtGIz2mq0EWrGyFF5KUNO0aW5XmMZjGBK_Z92skMSZ_4t-riwq6wSK3LwfuC21Ddew5lCpc-IiMNiaxXT793oA_o_7NC3ZA%3D%3D)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 10,000 votes short. **

Fellow American, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7ccbcd73245a4122b64ac1188677c5cb&_e=pwBPVLgoe5s76qz4BNH0vdeSeecNg7Fy5tknqWHZqHeyoAbu4DbTIJ19lsnJXmwSgqmiUwmcKiEt-uo8HcBRGTFSRKxpvJelhTFjTD7OfwPaJuGTdPxaXKyzA3xVhMWlYstYD7KhFY0-LOoHF-TujAOgmrKa1xxmWea5geYpVCdlGzDbEBvwGE4eCWjpoSkJt87oB7dj0loQSi-3KCUwe5AD8HKwx2s5b9fwxaB94uYxTKf1YMEwO1zCaZ3uQunsey-4BAswrEgOtjHa698T4gZsPD-u_tU4JxX8dgY2X1bgISxbFgFSxq9egGvAnvoIM6O7Nzvtzo6ftdF6jD8aSFZ1mxC997QnD70-lo6dPY79BJpohCe3yWBd2Sg3BvT5rvxf-o3ZqusiX2mfg5KkywNSy53pOWVWio_7EBw0zLEZld08raeRIbrYrzT0_L9rhKBZ_z8WkhrD4RLsEvFBHDaUXayttaR5Ov_1ifyXnrKXUv-8PxTDKySkHXnqk1Wkhvyvj4KFaEw_zZPyx0na7w%3D%3D)**

[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7ccbcd73245a4122b64ac1188677c5cb&_e=pwBPVLgoe5s76qz4BNH0vdeSeecNg7Fy5tknqWHZqHeyoAbu4DbTIJ19lsnJXmwSgqmiUwmcKiEt-uo8HcBRGTFSRKxpvJelhTFjTD7OfwPaJuGTdPxaXKyzA3xVhMWlYstYD7KhFY0-LOoHF-TujAOgmrKa1xxmWea5geYpVCdlGzDbEBvwGE4eCWjpoSkJt87oB7dj0loQSi-3KCUwe5AD8HKwx2s5b9fwxaB94uYxTKf1YMEwO1zCaZ3uQunsey-4BAswrEgOtjHa698T4gZsPD-u_tU4JxX8dgY2X1bgISxbFgFSxq9egGvAnvoIYbt8RmyhaQuHqHm5yIC1NaLyx8-7yObyqcStl4zo9f4PhB0NLWmE9OvJ3PVKUTO4qaik9_cDuPGHnbLAQybUrw3cBkzsNbqHKCiBrWFNQ14upucpzIVlkTwLLk7bavo1qfDHKFOzSrr2PVPTx_Q3DxfVvcW11fDJwWV5MMjia7kb_AX4NPcRJirW84VVZlneJYb5vCCiwOPTwIaEdgbWZw%3D%3D)
You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year’s midterm elections**_.

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=7ccbcd73245a4122b64ac1188677c5cb&_e=pwBPVLgoe5s76qz4BNH0vdeSeecNg7Fy5tknqWHZqHeyoAbu4DbTIJ19lsnJXmwSgqmiUwmcKiEt-uo8HcBRGTFSRKxpvJelhTFjTD7OfwPaJuGTdPxaXKyzA3xVhMWlYstYD7KhFY0-LOoHF-TujAOgmrKa1xxmWea5geYpVCdlGzDbEBvwGE4eCWjpoSkJt87oB7dj0loQSi-3KCUwe5AD8HKwx2s5b9fwxaB94uYxTKf1YMEwO1zCaZ3uQunsey-4BAswrEgOtjHa698T4gZsPD-u_tU4JxX8dgY2X1bgISxbFgFSxq9egGvAnvoIExZnBujr56mtKPTUoq2Yn3qjiw8pzFVvZSNtmcUH96jfSwFww_SeRY1JKyjZoMZRx8TZ2GS_Kcn4DwGqh9tizugeDziTtZA1jS6r3Q620lTYxbr71emwpo_cQzuvje9PJ-8ttrdFY4_OFcvnjVEqS7Ab-SeyVKuVfPcNBa1FjOzqbhW-I5e3P5p5767Ms2QR2Kx5nLZHp3GUGCjf4sb0cg%3D%3D)**

name: Tamara Bates
subject: CANDIDATE TRAINING: Project Build Blue Academy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party, Carol V
body:
https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/408597/ [https://www.mobilize.us/tndp/event/408597/]
Peter,
The Tennessee Democratic Party, together with the DNC and ASDC Best Practices Institute, are excited to announce the launch of our "Project Build Blue Academy."
In our first event on September 1st, candidates, campaign operatives, and anyone who wants to learn more about community organizing will gain skills on how to improve their ground game. Attendees will learn about campaign strategy, the basics of voter contact, GOTV, building local party and community infrastructure, how to organize, and more.

Friend,
Did you know that one out every three bites of food we eat comes from a crop pollinated by bees?
Yup, it's true. But unfortunately, honey bees and other pollinator populations have severely declined around the world over the past decade. An overwhelming number of **scientific studies link bee declines to the use of pesticides** , and illustrate the far reaching impacts toxic pesticides have on a wide range of environments.

I know how Republicans can take back the House Majority in November 2022. | Friend, Today I wanted to let you in on a little secret... I know how Republicans can take back the House Majority in November 2022. Republican women are at the forefront of our effort to end the Pelosi majority. There's one particular GOP member that is leading the charge, and she needs our immediate help to succeed - Congresswoman Debbie Lesko out in Arizona. - JOIN NIKKI HALEY - In 2018, Debbie defeated the Democrats in not one but TWO close races, first in a Special Election and then again in November. Then, she defeated the Democrats in 2020 - despite their ability to flip remaining parts of Arizona blue. These were huge accomplishments that took a lot of hard work and grassroots financial support, especially from supporters like you. It's pretty simple, Friend. Americans NEED Debbie Lesko in Washington to fight against the Left's massive spending, huge tax hikes, open borders and more government control -- we can't afford to lose her, which is why I'm reaching out today. - JOIN NIKKI HALEY - | | | | | | Debbie's wins have made the Democrats' House majority the narrowest in decades... and now we need just 5 more seats to demote Nancy Pelosi for good. But if we lose her seat, we risk playing catchup for years to come. I'm truly hoping you'll join me today in showing your support for a strong, conservative woman. My very best, Nikki Haley | Debbie Lesko currently serves as a U.S. Congresswoman for Arizona's 8th District. name: Great America Update
subject: The Genesis Story Online Course Now on DVD
body:
I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c390%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=WsU4aTbzPWkpINLGwvw84w&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65035%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rudo9g1ACbe5fSQSBEClxQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College’s popular online course, **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,”** is available on DVD.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65035%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Rudo9g1ACbe5fSQSBEClxQ&sysid=1)In this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

“The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education.

Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c65036%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PZSX%2bIkeOUR1WWAyTq9dsA&sysid=1)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.”
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Open and support classical K-12 charter schools through the College’s Barney Charter School Initiative.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **“The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.”**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

clean_body: I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news. This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day. I’m writing with some exciting news. Hillsdale College’s popular online course, “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,” is available on DVD. this six-lecture course, you’ll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature. “The Genesis Story” is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student’s theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text. The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it’s important to both faith and higher education. Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation. These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph. This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs. For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you’ll receive the DVD as our thank you. To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That’s why your support is so crucial. Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College’s national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation’s youth. Your gift will also help to: Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as “Genesis.” Expand the readership of Imprimis , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty. Open and support classical K-12 charter schools through the College’s Barney Charter School Initiative. Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio. Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale’s educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of “The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives.” Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

body:
If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=079beb11d99d44e2a2c2b95008ce7fbf&_e=Yau3bbN9DqAtI8U_rrX6V7-mnrfu-2ACQgr8VZHSoqYHrlPiy7ohkJSuuLhpMNxArviWddMhV5q5NR307wkjx5mOhNvlTec4WVDlahk2pd5Byx_nAU5pDSEZItfxV_39S9YHOyrx4wdO417oDMWfEseG3wy7V1xALGm7UOcREw3xO2rRwvrZPO7wkEMRAcAwKhq6z6NMPbYPxPlDsOCIUblIyOX--AGB2llZjoG9u0OzArNdsYl0A8YeJTdTBm949G2-C3KMbpQBNVfNLeea0FdkIP9uPIr2R4CCLUqgl6eZYwcN5O1eeg5wUO14f7mTef_vWBN6P1jWKSi-Ig_b3vsW97tmjL8GvF44CxFspS7mgpTjQQoAsGbqIlBc0WAB)
---
Peter,

In this Biden-initiated border crisis, illegals are flooding over our southern border in historic numbers, with lawlessness, crime, and now a public health crisis gripping the entire state of Texas.

[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=079beb11d99d44e2a2c2b95008ce7fbf&_e=Yau3bbN9DqAtI8U_rrX6V7-mnrfu-2ACQgr8VZHSoqYHrlPiy7ohkJSuuLhpMNxArviWddMhV5q5NR307wkjx5mOhNvlTec4WVDlahk2pd5Byx_nAU5pDSEZItfxV_39S9YHOyrx4wdO417oDMWfEseG3wy7V1xALGm7UOcREw2cjVwmp-DRSccPl3Jts0QiELPLvxRCa2nQshgtndaAzpwwKk359ZECYgz304LSFmK5lxGAR8ilnMPiHXhU1VDRo1A1fm3olGe3-1tnMeuFGliI2JDytpY284DP_5XYP-ZQiXYFTiO-3Kpwgv--MVmyoOE97GAJiRi8A3KLQJMrMF2WiFGClDzl4dSM21AcFGyVfG4ZQaZcxaLyNSr-5GWy)
The Rio Grande Valley is being hit especially hard, with most new COVID cases coming from illegals or Texans who have encountered these invaders. As the Biden administration, with Gov. Abbott's tacit approval, ships these illegals across the state, other urban health centers such as Houston, Austin, Dallas, and others are also suffering.

Peter, the recent revelation that we have hospitals in our border communities such as McAllen that have reached full capacity treating illegals with COVID is very disturbing. Texas hospitals should be treating Texans, but instead, we have a public health crisis because of an unsecured southern border.

Now, due to the overflow of ill illegals, Gov. Abbott has issued an order stating Texans should not have elective medical procedures!

We should not be sacrificing the healthcare of Texans for people who are violating the rule of law, Peter - it's just common sense.

_In fact_ , we should not be mandating COVID testing, mask wearing, and vaccinations on Texans while simultaneously not requiring the same for the illegals invading our state.

Peter, the lack of leadership in Texas for finally securing our border has resulted in a drug crisis, a rising crime wave, increased sex-trafficking, and a public health crisis across the Lone Star State. We should be putting Texans first, not those who disrespect our sovereignty.

[** PUT TEXANS FIRST ➞ **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=079beb11d99d44e2a2c2b95008ce7fbf&_e=Yau3bbN9DqAtI8U_rrX6V7-mnrfu-2ACQgr8VZHSoqYHrlPiy7ohkJSuuLhpMNxArviWddMhV5q5NR307wkjx5mOhNvlTec4WVDlahk2pd5Byx_nAU5pDSEZItfxV_39S9YHOyrx4wdO417oDMWfEseG3wy7V1xALGm7UOcREw1GXgUxMEecHEbpaC3KsIlHqXV7A4wTgLKd675dhltlAxrqnFqp0qq8UjQFuOs8yauVK68Z8axDCGfmnI3k098XuxJsTPJGL05eGWxzPArh8StRSbDI0WqfHexYZ5XyCZ1AVQfSTn7IXdqTA5rTGFJmpZ6n-jY2d8TnjWF5NYKFrrRiYd-etp26hv5pEZ5zLHqqnEw3PSMdJIR1lWPWJl6c)
Prioritizing illegals above Texans has pushed hospitals across our state to the breaking point and is forcing Texans to forego elective surgery and other crucial medical procedures.

If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. Texans must come first.

name: Allen West
subject: Texans must come first
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN
body:
If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=10d8bb65db3a4459a4df4e1983cefb86&_e=6L9J7_ba82qXorPHvVj1-RvQnY961E-fDdrQUWqmMeveRM_7hpGXrVm8D8xROtTcSeWpSjZVXVrkHuYM6PCtll5vgg-OyX2zzQEbjI_p4i8aqm2Vgp_CN2ftQ15RU7-4lmG04K23iM8VjVrpf1sxAevPRMpcz2vQi2DdZPiTHIOsN_cSABMNg6A0V76NNLKIrnihVBDGyMf3z827_6bLMspEZcvet0p3WcfReGdu39k0Ca1cDzJF2I05aUo6rclN7avVgrKw-iPI6dEZI2XhsuLOYYaPrdXSVDkNCxTf8FPYFfrY6OASpcH0pbgYdUq6e5s0R1owvu-qyVZTt0c6XdvEjiwXhYUYRGCcKaxgmawyzZ9umytECD75HZtuys8_5b39Q6F7KrYVzmjHpTK41A%3D%3D)
---
Peter,

In this Biden-initiated border crisis, illegals are flooding over our southern border in historic numbers, with lawlessness, crime, and now a public health crisis gripping the entire state of Texas.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=10d8bb65db3a4459a4df4e1983cefb86&_e=6L9J7_ba82qXorPHvVj1-RvQnY961E-fDdrQUWqmMeveRM_7hpGXrVm8D8xROtTcSeWpSjZVXVrkHuYM6PCtll5vgg-OyX2zzQEbjI_p4i8aqm2Vgp_CN2ftQ15RU7-4lmG04K23iM8VjVrpf1sxAevPRMpcz2vQi2DdZPiTHIOsN_cSABMNg6A0V76NNLKIFJXE4bFidqU8_BLW-mJHhJyZqlybNf108YdfPapUg3gwgAdE2xNdn9xKbDAwllZe4KGT9ZyHwSi5fobVOOHeuy1rvdxlV9R-vH_GaR3EGC4dHW5feDMeTViyYDn6UzjB-5pJDEnzYcczTIfm_Fxmi7g7F-F9Q1K43qyDpK9VGKFWzXbEtBJy-6glIzk1mD-NSRbnUH3a4nYKU-EBHN-r-A%3D%3D)
The Rio Grande Valley is being hit especially hard, with most new COVID cases coming from illegals or Texans who have encountered these invaders. As the Biden administration, with Gov. Abbott's tacit approval, ships these illegals across the state, other urban health centers such as Houston, Austin, Dallas, and others are also suffering.

Peter, the recent revelation that we have hospitals in our border communities such as McAllen that have reached full capacity treating illegals with COVID is very disturbing. Texas hospitals should be treating Texans, but instead, we have a public health crisis because of an unsecured southern border.

Now, due to the overflow of ill illegals, Gov. Abbott has issued an order stating Texans should not have elective medical procedures!

We should not be sacrificing the healthcare of Texans for people who are violating the rule of law, Peter - it's just common sense.

_In fact_ , we should not be mandating COVID testing, mask wearing, and vaccinations on Texans while simultaneously not requiring the same for the illegals invading our state.

Peter, the lack of leadership in Texas for finally securing our border has resulted in a drug crisis, a rising crime wave, increased sex-trafficking, and a public health crisis across the Lone Star State. We should be putting Texans first, not those who disrespect our sovereignty.

[** PUT TEXANS FIRST ➞ **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=10d8bb65db3a4459a4df4e1983cefb86&_e=6L9J7_ba82qXorPHvVj1-RvQnY961E-fDdrQUWqmMeveRM_7hpGXrVm8D8xROtTcSeWpSjZVXVrkHuYM6PCtll5vgg-OyX2zzQEbjI_p4i8aqm2Vgp_CN2ftQ15RU7-4lmG04K23iM8VjVrpf1sxAevPRMpcz2vQi2DdZPiTHIOsN_cSABMNg6A0V76NNLKIFDU1gJRBNU5xExCUbxaB0J6HXQfVfeXNVtTTL4wK6bwTYmYRoDC9CG-IgASwohAwXW_a-tci2TOr_l4MOJMYEcaZxo4NIksHbml7UkNVUlqwBci820_fJqxXMrC0g9S5MzZv401kxw2Wl56A1DJQJzazglfBXdTCa9KwFkGM4cc_hcYdc_Y5gWmZIvP05EuSV94H1QERe3aYAA-NZIdKzQ%3D%3D)
Prioritizing illegals above Texans has pushed hospitals across our state to the breaking point and is forcing Texans to forego elective surgery and other crucial medical procedures.

If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. Texans must come first.

[**Will you join me in this fight, Peter?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=10d8bb65db3a4459a4df4e1983cefb86&_e=6L9J7_ba82qXorPHvVj1-RvQnY961E-fDdrQUWqmMeveRM_7hpGXrVm8D8xROtTcSeWpSjZVXVrkHuYM6PCtll5vgg-OyX2zzQEbjI_p4i8aqm2Vgp_CN2ftQ15RU7-4lmG04K23iM8VjVrpf1sxAevPRMpcz2vQi2DdZPiTHIOsN_cSABMNg6A0V76NNLKIsDABUsNRaw0_2tVP-27KeRgEnARv4KUDC_CFVb05Yia2RfVyxESmaTSQRiIyQcjIg7fSjz8bMTZWILfiILbp9WmLs5LfSqWYfnb8Sic2KfJIFa43rMy2rBWC6foEPJgLtPvOh6Rxd5TPsqBRfe641ASiPZmDpwcC2hjey-w7SvC6inFcC5dYRznWHtUFiZcoKbjVfxxldOlnAlXi_OmCGw%3D%3D)

[**Your generous grassroots contribution of $25, $50, $75, $100 or even more to my campaign will help me reach Texas voters with my winning, conservative message and bring the tough, principled leadership we need in Austin to meet this challenge.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=10d8bb65db3a4459a4df4e1983cefb86&_e=6L9J7_ba82qXorPHvVj1-RvQnY961E-fDdrQUWqmMeveRM_7hpGXrVm8D8xROtTcSeWpSjZVXVrkHuYM6PCtll5vgg-OyX2zzQEbjI_p4i8aqm2Vgp_CN2ftQ15RU7-4lmG04K23iM8VjVrpf1sxAevPRMpcz2vQi2DdZPiTHIOsN_cSABMNg6A0V76NNLKIsudPH4eFIGi-zrD_1NW5W82r2VNY_-f5za0B1N8P0xrtIV29C-6y_hFvIsJx9Dk5Re6uY5y5VDsQubj4ePrD3PEpqWcdB6xX-9OGXkpEbTDiONe6Zz3KFLKyohei2_JyKEAp7jHa9HOAg7tA3Atr7dfprV5w1_x-k7tzeaY5i_Glm3cXwOquq5P3sCsJCfdS0hARDmD4tNw6fnOL9-nYLg%3D%3D)

[**Thank you, Peter - I hope to hear from you today!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=10d8bb65db3a4459a4df4e1983cefb86&_e=6L9J7_ba82qXorPHvVj1-RvQnY961E-fDdrQUWqmMeveRM_7hpGXrVm8D8xROtTcSeWpSjZVXVrkHuYM6PCtll5vgg-OyX2zzQEbjI_p4i8aqm2Vgp_CN2ftQ15RU7-4lmG04K23iM8VjVrpf1sxAevPRMpcz2vQi2DdZPiTHIOsN_cSABMNg6A0V76NNLKIFcljYyL1ABHOBy4FzhdIQEf1xBcndWLWQq8f7U52e2dC3C2XrTlNI1f10PmPcXqV3enGUyolxPpu7tKQLY-KrJsyXvAK5EkDa_jgyfJJRrQ59_dQEkstrc32fdxX71yQIoBn6josdPa2WtprGJ7U4vUEqjxdAiNk0wUtNKiV-Y8iH3DtCKvm6XPTlYSwHmUyKj0mk9fymnz40AFpNKAx0g%3D%3D)

Peter, the recent revelation that we have hospitals in our border communities such as McAllen that have reached full capacity treating illegals with COVID is very disturbing. Texas hospitals should be treating Texans, but instead, we have a public health crisis because of an unsecured southern border. Now, due to the overflow of ill illegals, Gov. Abbott has issued an order stating Texans should not have elective medical procedures! We should not be sacrificing the healthcare of Texans for people who are violating the rule of law, Peter - it's just common sense. In fact , we should not be mandating COVID testing, mask wearing, and vaccinations on Texans while simultaneously not requiring the same for the illegals invading our state. Peter, the lack of leadership in Texas for finally securing our border has resulted in a drug crisis, a rising crime wave, increased sex-trafficking, and a public health crisis across the Lone Star State. We should be putting Texans first, not those who disrespect our sovereignty. Prioritizing illegals above Texans has pushed hospitals across our state to the breaking point and is forcing Texans to forego elective surgery and other crucial medical procedures. If I'm elected governor, I will not tolerate the rights and health of Texans to be sacrificed at the altar of a leftist open borders agenda. Texans must come first. For Freedom, Allen B. West Lieutenant Colonel (Ret) | | POL. ADV. PAID FOR BY ALLEN WEST CAMPAIGN The election laws in Texas allow for unlimited donation amounts as long as the funds are not from an incorporated entity. Make checks payable: Allen West Campaign PO Box 740846 Dallas, TX 75374 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

Ben Ray and I come from hardworking families. I’m the son of an immigrant, union lineman and a factory worker; he was brought up by a union ironworker and a public school educator. And it’s a priority for both of us to support hardworking families like the ones we grew up in.
From the start of the pandemic, we’ve worked to secure the resources that our state’s communities are counting on and rebuild our economy to support all New Mexicans.
We fought hard to help pass a historic infrastructure package and budget resolution to repair our roads and bridges, take action on climate change, accelerate our transition to clean energy, improve education, and power our economic recovery. While I’ve been working to electrify America’s future and fund the rebates needed to make that happen, Ben Ray has helped lead the charge to include a pathway to citizenship for qualified immigrants, including our Dreamers and essential workers.
Our work together goes beyond the Senate floor. We’re both helping make sure our colleagues in battleground Senate races get re-elected in 2022, and also supporting local county parties throughout New Mexico. But that kind of work takes resources.
**So, can you chip in to both of our campaigns to power our work to improve life for hardworking folks in New Mexico and defend the Senate? Any amount helps — with every dollar adding up when you’re running a grassroots campaign.**

subject: September 11th, 2012 changed my life

body:
September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16f10ceaa0904b7899ecf0140b605875&_e=02bYSRZk1T8kUBHYep1Y_q1gYa0EoxPcUdD11I9QhCORZ36ljFTb__n_7z2USnBwus2VliEIz4gwrWq8myoew2eHPOyWChKVQ9s1edqV4MI9FIaYu54XlURXGOe6kWieNFQU8yP8okRoeRMwEQfPZBLlhMez0puLTO_T32ZTxZJc6NpyaJVW3jONdb6dx9thiY6-QGTrJOYCw-sTEG0hbmG-zDJWZ3D-hzUF81fQY_arI_PtRB7edwo36UzbOgx_eMkR-nM8M8MqUO0BtK2hmGXxrPv6wRhPUccu8PXBYWVEgiXjT16JnmzUjYJSL6CdCx91lnZtJcCHFDYCn3NBOyOst-UZDStImndsDldXOO5FbcKDhb-xUkxsSKbn8-N7WMLE2BYZvw9bc0qkU2pPjXnmahpwOsLIJLzGYQ0BS4ezmLzcO3OYWQSSWI-2nWOwcKw5WomzhsW_66LFpXnUqgczA3F50CTtqIFzBv2kikE%3D)

Peter,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16f10ceaa0904b7899ecf0140b605875&_e=02bYSRZk1T8kUBHYep1Y_q1gYa0EoxPcUdD11I9QhCORZ36ljFTb__n_7z2USnBwus2VliEIz4gwrWq8myoew2eHPOyWChKVQ9s1edqV4MI9FIaYu54XlURXGOe6kWieNFQU8yP8okRoeRMwEQfPZBLlhMez0puLTO_T32ZTxZJc6NpyaJVW3jONdb6dx9thiY6-QGTrJOYCw-sTEG0hbmG-zDJWZ3D-hzUF81fQY_arI_PtRB7edwo36UzbOgx_eMkR-nM8M8MqUO0BtK2hmAqfdakn7Wpc5f2ZeBqhJeN1scdNLVMH4nxE2CnaegyAdU66mSMPo8i_Q95jdMep1BMx26GLlOi3TT6BwhUyKFitps6CpaLkYFM21-uop74G78gf3az37lpP3RJ3aSuE1v4unklMWQvhWZB4I2qUM01l3aPwmeWAy3LTHekYn0vZw4lXZSYNp7BxUFDXq4PudP4r0d55uxmZ5cWQqFkKKZA%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16f10ceaa0904b7899ecf0140b605875&_e=02bYSRZk1T8kUBHYep1Y_q1gYa0EoxPcUdD11I9QhCORZ36ljFTb__n_7z2USnBwus2VliEIz4gwrWq8myoew2eHPOyWChKVQ9s1edqV4MI9FIaYu54XlURXGOe6kWieNFQU8yP8okRoeRMwEQfPZBLlhMez0puLTO_T32ZTxZJc6NpyaJVW3jONdb6dx9thiY6-QGTrJOYCw-sTEG0hbmG-zDJWZ3D-hzUF81fQY_arI_PtRB7edwo36UzbOgx_eMkR-nM8M8MqUO0BtK2hmM7cnClj74CJqQoKeksDBg9axxoKu1SuImdUzEpU-bQI03dDvNCRLBAnLtpm7ZH4YPL_80lo9uqfzP3KxPH07lQwJwtRinSDp8p1p6ItKUhX1vXUmxigBdBRndmeL4qA1XZc_E3c8daFy_7SDJRCQH2WS2DW8XfCKucOXxHH3Ba0U_pSiGPEfP4gydox5fW5FHy2cH2SjWzg-1P4qSFdxJs%3D)
---

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16f10ceaa0904b7899ecf0140b605875&_e=02bYSRZk1T8kUBHYep1Y_q1gYa0EoxPcUdD11I9QhCORZ36ljFTb__n_7z2USnBwus2VliEIz4gwrWq8myoew2eHPOyWChKVQ9s1edqV4MI9FIaYu54XlURXGOe6kWieNFQU8yP8okRoeRMwEQfPZBLlhMez0puLTO_T32ZTxZJc6NpyaJVW3jONdb6dx9thiY6-QGTrJOYCw-sTEG0hbmG-zDJWZ3D-hzUF81fQY_arI_PtRB7edwo36UzbOgx_eMkR-nM8M8MqUO0BtK2hmJOUnox9K7Hd0bcNo1DAM-A22o2YHZuJR5AUAhh-R1UoFj07TG6e2DXs4aZjGfJgcOrN4gP_2Q-QgWEvh3OyXoy4ZDJz6HC8Ezm7ZPDpLmmzR3xPO7A1ZXILOVwd5rqDa33Kt08Go4u77YzVhv_c7lveeJS-xeDlI9IMZflv_elGV35hYWgz7b4co2Srwl1bZLgXR7teG9rPkSsecLGHJBk%3D)**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16f10ceaa0904b7899ecf0140b605875&_e=02bYSRZk1T8kUBHYep1Y_q1gYa0EoxPcUdD11I9QhCORZ36ljFTb__n_7z2USnBwus2VliEIz4gwrWq8myoew2eHPOyWChKVQ9s1edqV4MI9FIaYu54XlURXGOe6kWieNFQU8yP8okRoeRMwEQfPZBLlhMez0puLTO_T32ZTxZJc6NpyaJVW3jONdb6dx9thiY6-QGTrJOYCw-sTEG0hbmG-zDJWZ3D-hzUF81fQY_arI_PtRB7edwo36UzbOgx_eMkR-nM8M8MqUO0BtK2hmInApMWo6eFNP_0Uiz6GNjbyF6E_J0NbPLCCe8B0bcBStBUe0c6uuSL5SAX6QJjImSSzkeYS87rTwOor3paDJiP9U_1L5yneuDVaXkmlysCJuItZ1GT8zhcIJE7CO2XcGOC-4JE3_C3O6s6EEivzBfJNdN2GwcQO-hmfoM22390KBtl3sdFCTM5abdKW4MTt3vUTcAgyHOav1wwfBWtMRt8%3D)
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16f10ceaa0904b7899ecf0140b605875&_e=02bYSRZk1T8kUBHYep1Y_q1gYa0EoxPcUdD11I9QhCORZ36ljFTb__n_7z2USnBwus2VliEIz4gwrWq8myoew2eHPOyWChKVQ9s1edqV4MI9FIaYu54XlURXGOe6kWieNFQU8yP8okRoeRMwEQfPZBLlhMez0puLTO_T32ZTxZJc6NpyaJVW3jONdb6dx9thiY6-QGTrJOYCw-sTEG0hbmG-zDJWZ3D-hzUF81fQY_arI_PtRB7edwo36UzbOgx_eMkR-nM8M8MqUO0BtK2hmOsqXuwBEWBBxKDvtY7WGzH0wqwx8rHw4PYAc0XZH6qDUnDLtH_iYbfzWVsxagn-Sbugm_PaQDVqCAF2QnNId_N7B09rvzODBseYZKg-FgsZ4CWThjBcdfoPVYf30-I8LvS5QaMSlwTDur7ZqxgCNk3VVcLIJe9XxTDV3rv5dnTyY3zo3I387F61NcgZg53Uqhh_pi9XNmZ9b6yzyZBgeMg%3D)

[**HELP ME FIGHT FOR AMERICA'S FUTURE
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16f10ceaa0904b7899ecf0140b605875&_e=02bYSRZk1T8kUBHYep1Y_q1gYa0EoxPcUdD11I9QhCORZ36ljFTb__n_7z2USnBwus2VliEIz4gwrWq8myoew2eHPOyWChKVQ9s1edqV4MI9FIaYu54XlURXGOe6kWieNFQU8yP8okRoeRMwEQfPZBLlhMez0puLTO_T32ZTxZJc6NpyaJVW3jONdb6dx9thiY6-QGTrJOYCw-sTEG0hbmG-zDJWZ3D-hzUF81fQY_arI_PtRB7edwo36UzbOgx_eMkR-nM8M8MqUO0BtK2hmMywEEIHBd6tmUAkARL_oyhi7XUmXLJqjJEMqb2GUGkFH6xW4zeSIc5KhiWSknCCgyxr6Yh-l1f_VqOaqanYR24AFjXLrbSvhDwyvfrvrK6MC1tIneuWGXke-P7r6CdI9bNaSODYH89dFnjtI_V2Iup5ZfXiI-gVEkeUwKpi_JgOWc0nIfTqB_q0CFKPk6UmX380A3fUN5SOdpFJbrv4ZIU%3D)
---

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won’t you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16f10ceaa0904b7899ecf0140b605875&_e=02bYSRZk1T8kUBHYep1Y_q1gYa0EoxPcUdD11I9QhCORZ36ljFTb__n_7z2USnBwus2VliEIz4gwrWq8myoew2eHPOyWChKVQ9s1edqV4MI9FIaYu54XlURXGOe6kWieNFQU8yP8okRoeRMwEQfPZBLlhMez0puLTO_T32ZTxZJc6NpyaJVW3jONdb6dx9thiY6-QGTrJOYCw-sTEG0hbmG-zDJWZ3D-hzUF81fQY_arI_PtRB7edwo36UzbOgx_eMkR-nM8M8MqUO0BtK2hmLoiOpb-gL6TlXzytDMPWm7SP2qGrxlG-Nk5ipOlCLnpOdDXtB4j5L90Y65EXhihRw_UaB5wF_Jd6bl3D-MQdgpzegCOMDrvcNQ-v0BwIIqI0B8ZQ7kvflqd0sjc83zaQO0giRNaNnRylYKB7ar7WRawU0okEBcNrk6aJmqHCpSioA_lImb-7SDG9Rsk12dfddYHZEmPnOx0g8nHoAjCgJM%3D)**

In service
John Castorani
Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07

**P.S.** I have no money to invest in this campaign. **What I do have is a lot of pride** , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can,**[chip in $5 or $10 today to help send me to Congress and hold career politicians accountable.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=16f10ceaa0904b7899ecf0140b605875&_e=02bYSRZk1T8kUBHYep1Y_q1gYa0EoxPcUdD11I9QhCORZ36ljFTb__n_7z2USnBwus2VliEIz4gwrWq8myoew2eHPOyWChKVQ9s1edqV4MI9FIaYu54XlURXGOe6kWieNFQU8yP8okRoeRMwEQfPZBLlhMez0puLTO_T32ZTxZJc6NpyaJVW3jONdb6dx9thiY6-QGTrJOYCw-sTEG0hbmG-zDJWZ3D-hzUF81fQY_arI_PtRB7edwo36UzbOgx_eMkR-nM8M8MqUO0BtK2hmIet1Vc03fuf1mfJ8p7Y5CC64ZhDa0BfgjOJkONQ7qjZXKI4kORoZIyRd0Ie92G3fJJdSb6JUxLlF0H-f4YE7iAu993pLOJWhCl5ltAKINxVaUerTFyjsU_JBOG7M_Epvs2LQscujqiK8LH7ENSgVwct2RVUv29cTEO3wFJTGcq23ZiZtKANnY4BQ1fkVNfYvNuhkCHDbsVQqYRLKzwcNZ8%3D)**

_We have put together some key economic data for your awareness:_

• U.S. inflation is hovering around 5.4%.
• The national debt is approaching $29 trillion.
• Democrats plan to forge ahead with a $3.5 trillion infrastructure bill -- a surefire inflation nightmare.

The bottom line: Democrats don’t care about our national debt. They never have and they never will. Democratic socialism would cost $42.5 trillion in its first decade.

**Inflation is a hidden tax slamming hardworking, lower- and middle-income families the hardest: That’s hardworking Hoosier families being harmed the most.

Sorry for the late email, friend, but I had to reach out one last time to let top supporters like you know we're still short of the resources we need to defeat GOP extremists and flip Arizona blue.
This timing is a serious problem: The stakes are getting higher every day, and the difference between a win and a loss will have ripple effects through _generations_ of Arizonans' lives.

Rachel Maddow says the Arizona GOP's election audit could lead to the "end of democracy" – but Donald Trump and his QAnon co-conspirators are doing whatever they can to push this sham audit and overturn the 2020 election. The only surefire way we can win the battle for our democracy is by electing a Democratic governor and kicking these GOP extremists out of power.
That's why I'm in this fight, but I need your help to win. We have to fight hard, stay focused and hit every goal – so I'm personally asking: **[Friend, can you chip in $5, $25, whatever you can spare, to hit our goal by midnight, keep pushing to flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34547765/302324390/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk175-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Njk4MDEyMC03MzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=97d6Y5CfFCaHiCi4HAd3tNPLPMhhMqAMfZ8sfipUjyk=)**

name: Erica Smith
subject: For every $1, we’ll knock on a door in a county that Trump won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Let’s flip North Carolina blue, transform our politics, and change our country.
#
I’ve said from the start of this campaign for U.S. Senate that we will go everywhere, we will fight for every vote, and we will write no one-off. And we meant it.
As I’ve traveled across North Carolina and met with people from all walks of life, I’ve seen that we’re all caught up in the same rigged economy, in the same broken health care system, and facing the same climate crisis.
None of us are alone, and if we want to transform our politics and change our country, we have to all come together and set aside politics as usual.
It’s time to forge a new path forward, and that starts with showing up. **That’s why for every dollar our campaign raises through this email, we’re knocking on one door in a county that Donald Trump won in 2020.** One dollar, one vote.
**So, I’m personally asking:** [**Will you make a $5 donation to our people-powered campaign for U.S. Senate right now? Every dollar is one more door we can knock, one more voice we can lift up, and one more person we can welcome into our movement.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12213?refcode=em20210823-372&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=372%2E3698%2EsfMaJE)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12213?refcode=em20210823-372&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=372%2E3698%2EsfMaJE)**
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12213?refcode=em20210823-372&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=372%2E3698%2EsfMaJE)
I know what it means to struggle, and I’ve walked through enough of these doors to understand that behind each and every one of them is someone facing life’s deepest challenges.
A family that can’t afford their medication. Someone who can barely put food on their table. A mom struggling to work three jobs just to make ends meet.
**We have to stop seeing these doors as walls. No community should be left behind. And as your senator, I promise to stand with you and be a voice for all.**
[**But I need your help to reach as many people as possible and build a movement powerful enough to flip North Carolina blue in 2022. Anything you can contribute right now will make a direct and immediate impact on our organizing efforts.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12213?refcode=em20210823-372&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=372%2E3698%2EsfMaJE)
I believe in North Carolina. I believe in us, and I truly believe that one door at a time, we can change this country.
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/12213?refcode=em20210823-372&%3Bamp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=372%2E3698%2EsfMaJE)
Erica
Erica Smith For U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210823-372-footer&t=24&refcode2=372_3698_sfMaJE&akid=372%2E3698%2EsfMaJE)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

clean_body: | | | Team — With your help, we are going to defeat Kevin McCarthy and we want to tell you exactly how we’ll do it. The thing is, team, the way we win this campaign won’t be done using some magical formula or exclusive access to a set of data that guarantees an outcome. We are going to tell the truth about Kevin McCarthy. We are going to tell the truth about how he has continually blocked support and resources for the vast majority of CA-23 — while answering to the large corporations and wealthy donors who bankroll his campaign. We are going to tell the truth about how he has aligned himself with right wing extremism and promotes dangerous efforts to undermine elections, democracy, and the safety of people both in his district and across the country. We are going to tell the truth about Kevin McCarthy and show him for what he truly is — a dangerous person only interested in advancing his fortune and his political ambitions while the people he represents are left with no leadership or support even in times of great need or crisis. To do this, team, we need to make sure we have the resources to go out and have these conversations with folks all across the Central Valley. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately That’s why this campaign to elect Bruno is so important. As a veteran and a proud union member, Bruno has always been committed to serving the people and in Congress, he will be a tireless advocate for us — not large corporations, not wealthy donors and not right wing extremists intent on undoing democracy. With your support, we can make sure people know the truth about Kevin McCarthy and bring this people powered campaign to the halls of Congress. Thank you, team. None of this is possible without you. Team Bruno | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress

Friend,
I’m outraged at the lack of leadership Biden demonstrated in his exit from Afghanistan, and the impact it’s had on American lives, our troops, and innocent women and children!
**I’ve spent my career holding government insiders accountable. Had I been in the Senate, I would have exposed the outrageous flaws of Biden’s exit plan!** **I would have demanded to see a full and complete transition plan** that resulted in a stable and secure Afghanistan. Biden’s failed leadership has been completely exposed but at enormous expense.
**WE NEED COMMON SENSE LEADERSHIP IN THE SENATE NOW!**
