clean_body: | | | | Kelly would have influenced a different outcome... Friend, I’m outraged at the lack of leadership Biden demonstrated in his exit from Afghanistan, and the impact it’s had on American lives, our troops, and innocent women and children! I’ve spent my career holding government insiders accountable. Had I been in the Senate, I would have exposed the outrageous flaws of Biden’s exit plan! I would have demanded to see a full and complete transition plan that resulted in a stable and secure Afghanistan. Biden’s failed leadership has been completely exposed but at enormous expense. WE NEED COMMON SENSE LEADERSHIP IN THE SENATE NOW! We must hold Biden accountable for his horrifying mishandling of the Afghanistan exit,but I need your help. Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Did you see this op-ed in the Washington Post?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We know momentum is on our side to deliver on the urgent priorities we promised voters last year when they delivered Democrats the House, the Senate, and the White House — and we’re not letting up now.
#
Peter,
Earlier this month, a few moderate Democrats announced that they would attempt to derail the bold jobs and families package championed by Pramila and President Biden — one that makes transformative investments in working people and our communities.
And in a new op-ed in _The Washington Post_ today, they doubled down on their deeply unpopular position ahead of a key vote, claiming that "_time kills deals."_
Are they serious? **What actually kills is not having health care, not being able to afford prescriptions, not stopping the deadly climate crisis already devastating our communities, not being able to take paid leave, not having a roof over your head, and so much more that we finally address in this popular jobs and families package.**
Peter, we know momentum is on our side to deliver on the urgent priorities we promised voters last year when they delivered Democrats the House, the Senate, and the White House — _and we’re not letting up now._ **[Rush a donation of $3 or more to our campaign today so we have the resources to keep up the fight for a jobs and families plan that fully invests in us and our communities.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210823?refcode=em20210823-568&t=20&refcode2=568_420207_A2mwGe&akid=568%2E420207%2EA2mwGe)**
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210823?refcode=em20210823-568&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=568_420207_A2mwGe&akid=568%2E420207%2EA2mwGe)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210823-568-footer&t=22&refcode2=568_420207_A2mwGe&akid=568%2E420207%2EA2mwGe)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=568%2E420207%2EA2mwGe)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=568%2E420207%2EA2mwGe)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

I need you from the very beginning to help me defeat Marco Rubio. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIUrkzn_p74ulO4bBXYg1xR40xzfsV_3OsFl-TeznRMf6KUPDhMI-q3SAvHRP9JYJldLp-UOzHypOsvWBlCBHz-myLoRoj8t9W6lXu5etSP999FPhMsWsEhezotrtnEdmMk9JgAezlgb-EuU_jwzPlCq65l_TnscD3xXIjbjwEEbOfGbjxzbWI4crU5TUqmq8-y8Nabj8gmSRxI50GnbUO59T1BK-tyc9Lba2vdvx_c_ZUmX5hh3MYsS9Kp9Bc-wTdp4q5O89hAaD_6Wzh6fTryLQr21O2wc0BpvaU2fYot57/3ep/Ldo8NR-ZTwmVGlCYZo3Mrg/h0/4Hh-0KyjO8GZBNLGcx4NvOQw7WcWyKElyV_WSafMPjQ)
Derek,

I recently announced I'm running for the U.S. Senate against Marco Rubio. CNN is already calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip – **and with Senate control on the line, everybody from Mitch McConnell to Donald Trump to far-right outside groups will do whatever it takes to defeat me.**

That's why I'm making an important ask of you – one that will determine whether our campaign comes out of the gate as strong as possible: **[will you become a Founding Donor to this campaign by splitting a contribution of $20 or more between my campaign and Common Good VA today? Every dollar you give will ensure we have the resources, from the very beginning, to defeat Marco Rubio and flip Florida blue.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIUrkzn_p74ulO4bBXYg1xR5PKXkkNflPEmYVxZAGOwoxXI2sK17XrMbdBD6hSFevpiOaLrcEE1AwWeV-TyjHMPtwfXm6pKD0AHusPqOEhKZUvGHpazNStzAl2PqZ9z1pffgt5JNrnGqYpPga9AWJ-XXlWaf3tMNiloKlvAVQ_P8fvtkd9MtSK8Svxy79b46WeLlOBTuYQTh9N1jIGduvRXbSLytC8AvSg21QzBcfkHenLKH_6HnSSaqLfNymfAvWzgq2mEVYkBlXMViXGXrX8OSiU_d6s8nbzkrI5aCX-IhU/3ep/Ldo8NR-ZTwmVGlCYZo3Mrg/h1/6HfBosx7bS5a1KqfgUinm68zqgUpd96VtnTT1J3QMzo)**

There's no need to beat around the bush, Derek: defeating Marco Rubio is going to be tough. He will have tens of millions of dollars in right-wing, special-interest money on his side. The GOP will attack me relentlessly to keep this seat red, because Senate control could come down to what we do in Florida. **[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIUrkzn_p74ulO4bBXYg1xR4RzzjFmUyXe2QUnboseMKQmj7G5_Vr4aVFe5fN7i0bb0GWrrMqzVfR08SnUtOuRYQ9GHgMQReWa7MEAHVj9wV7fSuQOiJa37jzF-Nhz8qVM9piVKsfyFIIsB491OktnnzguTkfBEIkMnmNUUnPL88umzK296RnwoFIXxjGgV1ASVf3o8cvJsQiVQLB38hRAtUhMGP6_LxEgv2u_p7wv9p_3Y1-KpBugjEdEj42W1fImuduhLF1jfYdxditMFs3YxUw0pFpqqz7DcAroYN58NRd/3ep/Ldo8NR-ZTwmVGlCYZo3Mrg/h2/f86sgb2FpBd7VSySECmFztqT6cRO7nHEDfJ6-aE5LBM)** **Keep this number in mind: 10,033.** That's the number of votes that decided Florida's last Senate race – a margin of just two-tenths of a percentage point. That's about as slim as margins come, so I need you to hear me when I say this: Our ability to register and mobilize voters – our ability to _win_ – hinges on the resources we're able to build up from day one.

It's how we won in Georgia and took back the Senate. It's how Joe Biden and Kamala Harris won the White House. And it's how we'll flip Florida blue and protect our majorities in Congress so we can continue delivering the bold agenda that the American people deserve.

**I need you with me, Derek. I need you from the very beginning – as a Founding Donor – to help me defeat Marco Rubio. Will you step up and join us now?[Split a donation of $20 or more between my campaign and Common Good VA to become a Founding Donor right now so we can flip Florida blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIUrkzn_p74ulO4bBXYg1xR7sa-7yuUkY8SRfJ85RE5jUNPMRIFI3u1HO4SsSpazm_l2V9jsrma2b7KJz-3ofCLHXZSE26hyXKrzwuaDndj7bTeANoU0lCfkPRiN9Fb3TbdRUWNhYyxZiMlDYXdooXFpltnWTEjYQhd3NZ06RMcIEQBQU0g0XeYbrslb7mlS3eHItFXZKIB1-jZDzBKtp6_fzplvCmd0h6r-hXEPhP0pc4HorC7QhEHa4wWKCang8VL_60gcuxkt0JCzH_glzLCEaoCbU-_g2b72CECQKhyN-/3ep/Ldo8NR-ZTwmVGlCYZo3Mrg/h3/iFHEkq7dbvwAnAYxfmQmA0Hn5bojCqlRmPtO-aSPsM4)** **[ Donate $25 ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miGmooKlJZ8bE2An4IJ-bFIb4mSrfJczPUetfRyKeqB5mgachpID9Oz0OSoUDOrTLGtpvrxAMrBN08rF65g0gTA1YBbzyJZtXubBhnIDSqce2nMpqW3PirtqAKSqZj9H0MJt8-5Y8n0EfEcR8e1EvnMA3ZCzs13aHDwoLtZ_uhInMDJDpgm5ZYhZcDUAOXo27vOo2GvueakivKY3FjiMu7Toq_TEWsP3Y5GmsOED-dSIlbCHMVLp8A7dTRU8prZur8T5n319uZtZDVF2gHLCeG8i5FAe44RNTTDb8frZyUHS38XUOLpHIh-qpwKb_RZqsxdxFIU7zkABLflIJb3LOy0A/3ep/Ldo8NR-ZTwmVGlCYZo3Mrg/h4/-y_ZhQFGj7uoSHVhbU8_8K-r2cQojLOznbBXchqVS9k)

name: Burgess Owens (via House Conservatives Fund)
subject: Biden's presidency reaches the breaking point
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HOUSE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND
body:
Fellow Conservative, **_The cracks in Joe Biden’s presidency are starting to show. _** He unilaterally decided to pull our troops out of Afghanistan, _but that’s just scratching the surface of his incompetent leadership._ **Within 7 months in the Oval Office, Joe Biden has started America down a path of irreparable damage:** **[1]** **Inflation is out of control**. Normal people cannot afford groceries because prices on all consumer goods are shooting up. **[2]** Our Southern Border, which was protected by President Trump, is under constant attack. **Illegal crossings are up some 900%****** and the **Border Wall has been abandoned****** by his administration. **[3]** Police are under attack as the **Defund the Police movement** gains traction and Joe Biden makes no moves to **Back the Blue.** **[Will you join me and House Conservatives to hold Joe Biden accountable? >>>](http://links.houseconservatives.com/u/click?_t=2f157a537fc642c9aa7481bf474f3189&_m=bb651b8e6c604520a250d3b82dc261b1&_e=LohSqzxUmCA61snp18MdFhcZ61B584qTe3FxX9BV7xo79rHlbYpf4HU1X6J1kZQZhZ9E8uaGJ8Yrlukc8D_YnslfXI9lyllho0AVDkk7dhRfYgzPPiycUAQ9pkfwJ-6u41RGJ5pWZ2BkeSOdunPfJRgqD82EGunEkLtjPXVVJtlvO0Hqm9vWKu6t5ULxwxEMm58Flb_x5rFPNUpET3UCHff9-RMvhQqbkXud7yq5JwK6r0cWw2Rz3FMGEN99vFqpmmf-GdJk2iEDTi_djlQP1U5brq83gVwNQw5UTOzQ3G2yjIbER6fJzGVvKgm1CuRpLtflZZBGs-AqKGtH3Lzorpp08q71aVEleflyRQRu7dopE0Sfn_broAVV4cXAmFeyrWpFzaef063YoTHYxifLc6hWc5y0Dgexn9V0w-7u7VQEh17oO0ijbXAN5qY18axoV3lKdEqJmccIkYpyLm9clgFGODxytxsexlvjRt3pVgQ%3D)** [**Join Burgess Owens**](http://links.houseconservatives.com/u/click?_t=2f157a537fc642c9aa7481bf474f3189&_m=bb651b8e6c604520a250d3b82dc261b1&_e=LohSqzxUmCA61snp18MdFhcZ61B584qTe3FxX9BV7xo79rHlbYpf4HU1X6J1kZQZhZ9E8uaGJ8Yrlukc8D_YnslfXI9lyllho0AVDkk7dhRfYgzPPiycUAQ9pkfwJ-6u41RGJ5pWZ2BkeSOdunPfJRgqD82EGunEkLtjPXVVJtlvO0Hqm9vWKu6t5ULxwxEMm58Flb_x5rFPNUpET3UCHaetMM7_fL3ruNHTadvofqAsBSCH3ivWq6a35W0_sEXLJrs14I-cwmmm8IP9z9JTIsiuH5R4Y-ZF7mjN2BOKb6pZAvDiBGNGlFtECVWoL2MdqjRVph8N-QKC1Pm0_EiKmUDHBSwtdspNd0gCyQC5PExu5_jVPMB2scaxpV-ZEv7HWzWOza2DO9SA-B1Pj0QooBgIFZbdAEu7KIBK15hnAtaVNabdjONeiZbMI0B-VEliN9XE0gDgXN4W--45jW9os9zPqHwQQP3hYxc-ar9pacM%3D) It seems all Joe Biden has really gotten done is passing a Trojan Horse “infrastructure” deal in the House that is really a front for **Green New Deal** provisions.

clean_body: Fellow Conservative, The cracks in Joe Biden’s presidency are starting to show. He unilaterally decided to pull our troops out of Afghanistan, but that’s just scratching the surface of his incompetent leadership. Within 7 months in the Oval Office, Joe Biden has started America down a path of irreparable damage: [1] Inflation is out of control. Normal people cannot afford groceries because prices on all consumer goods are shooting up. [2] Our Southern Border, which was protected by President Trump, is under constant attack. Illegal crossings are up some 900%** and the Border Wall has been abandoned**** by his administration. [3] Police are under attack as the Defund the Police movement gains traction and Joe Biden makes no moves to Back the Blue. It seems all Joe Biden has really gotten done is passing a Trojan Horse “infrastructure” deal in the House that is really a front for Green New Deal** provisions. Fellow Conservative, I’m tired of having a President who works more to placate his followers than to pass helpful legislation. The American people can’t take much more of his negligent leadership. Thank you, Burgess Owens House Conservatives Fund Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. HCF’s current roster of 140 members understands that our mission has never been more urgent than it is today. House Conservatives Fund . subject: McCarthy only cares about one thing.
body:
it's a HUGE slap in the face.... | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34549289/302340853/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDUyM2U1Ny03YzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6AhMv6W7tFBMheoIXD8G9mwSMfW17R0Dya6Nk9vLAfs=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/cb523e57-7c04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7/d0523e57-7c04-ec11-b563-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDUyM2U1Ny03YzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6AhMv6W7tFBMheoIXD8G9mwSMfW17R0Dya6Nk9vLAfs=&id=124172018)._
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34549290/302340854/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDUyM2U1Ny03YzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6AhMv6W7tFBMheoIXD8G9mwSMfW17R0Dya6Nk9vLAfs=)
I'll state the obvious, friend: I'm not a politician.

But it doesn't take being an elected official to know that our Central Valley community is one of the poorest in the state. So it's a HUGE slap in the face that all Kevin McCarthy cares about is becoming Speaker of the House and his mega donors.

**I've worked for over two decades serving students and their parents in our community. I could care less about the Speaker's gavel.**

This campaign is about engaging our community around the real issues that matter for the Central Valley -- health care access, education, raising our wages, strengthening our agricultural economy, and fixing our immigration system.

Beating a guy like Kevin McCarthy means talking to everyone -- so right now, we're hiring organizers to mobilize voters in every corner of this district as early as possible. No community will be written off because they are "too Republican" or vote too infrequently.

**Friend, NOTHING would ruin McCarthy's plan to become Speaker better than crushing him at the ballot box in his own backyard. We can do this, but it’s going to take a lot of grassroots support.**

**[Can you chip in $3 to our campaign to DEFEAT GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy? We need to raise another $9,101 before midnight to keep pace -- just 14 donors from your area will help us meet the mark.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34549291/302340855/-686739743?refcode=em-08232021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDUyM2U1Ny03YzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6AhMv6W7tFBMheoIXD8G9mwSMfW17R0Dya6Nk9vLAfs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/34549292/302340856/-686739743?refcode=em-08232021-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDUyM2U1Ny03YzA0LWVjMTEtYjU2My01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6AhMv6W7tFBMheoIXD8G9mwSMfW17R0Dya6Nk9vLAfs=)

To support Marisa Wood's campaign, = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . = I'll state the obvious, friend: I'm not a politician. But it doesn't take being an elected official to know that our Central Valley community is one of the poorest in the state. So it's a HUGE slap in the face that all Kevin McCarthy cares about is becoming Speaker of the House and his mega donors. I've worked for over two decades serving students and their parents in our community. I could care less about the Speaker's gavel. This campaign is about engaging our community around the real issues that matter for the Central Valley -- health care access, education, raising our wages, strengthening our agricultural economy, and fixing our immigration system. Beating a guy like Kevin McCarthy means talking to everyone -- so right now, we're hiring organizers to mobilize voters in every corner of this district as early as possible. No community will be written off because they are "too Republican" or vote too infrequently. Friend, NOTHING would ruin McCarthy's plan to become Speaker better than crushing him at the ballot box in his own backyard. body:
| | | **CNN BREAKING: The political environment is moving toward Republicans**
We can't believe what we're seeing.

CNN just reported that all signs are pointing to one thing: **We are perilously close to losing our House Majority to the Republicans.**

**[And we're calling for your help and your $3 to stop it.](https://links.e.dccc.)**

It's clear that ever since their humiliating defeats in 2O2O, Republicans have been working overtime to avenge Donald Trump and destroy our progress:

\-- They're targeting 57 of our House Democrats for defeat.
\-- They've broken FIVE fundraising records to buy back power.
\-- And they have $7 MILLION more lining their war chest than our House Democrats.

**Please understand: We must turn the tide -- and FAST -- if we want any hope of defending our House Majority and preventing a total Republican takeover.**

**[That's why we're calling for 2,000 gifts before midnight to protect our Democratic House Majority and stop this Republican momentum in its tracks. Will you rush $3 straight away to defend our House Democrats?](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [MAJORITY DEFENDER CONTRIBUTION: **PENDING**

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: re: BREAKING new poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
John is still the *only* Democratic candidate who can soundly defeat every Republican in this race.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210823-2374-header&t=1&akid=2374%2E434096%2EaDOtkO)
Peter, a brand new poll about our race just dropped. 👀
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28486?refcode=em20210823-2374&t=2&akid=2374%2E434096%2EaDOtkO)
This is HUGE. Among registered Pennsylvania voters, John Fetterman is leading this race to replace Pat Toomey and flip this ultra-competitive Senate seat blue in 2022.
[**Chip in right now to keep our momentum growing in this critical phase of the race. How much we can raise while it's still early will play a massive role in building a campaign that can go the distance in the general election.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28486?refcode=em20210823-2374&t=3&akid=2374%2E434096%2EaDOtkO)
**[Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28486?refcode=em20210823-2374&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2374%2E434096%2EaDOtkO)**
**Here's what we know:** John Fetterman is the *only* Democrat in this race who has run and won statewide in Pennsylvania before. And with a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate, we can't risk the possibility of Republicans + Mitch McConnell regaining power.
**But here's what else:** As soon as Republicans see these poll numbers with John firmly in the lead, they're going to flood this race with cash. And last time this seat was up in 2016, it was the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history.
[**Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to fight back against the attacks that are sure to come our way from our GOP opponents? As Republican super PACs and GOP mega-donors prepare to spend millions to try to buy this Senate seat, John is counting on you to step up in a big way by making your first-ever donation to our campaign right now.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28486?refcode=em20210823-2374&t=23&akid=2374%2E434096%2EaDOtkO)
The great news about this latest poll is that John is in the lead. But that also means that we have to look ahead and build the kind of campaign that can go toe-to-toe against the GOP in the general election.
**We know Republicans are going to pour corporate and super PAC money into this race as soon as they see John leading the field, but we can fend off their attacks if we raise enough at this crucial early stage of the race.**
John doesn't accept a cent of corporate PAC money. Never has, never will. [**But that means we're relying on grassroots donors like you from all across the country. Your donation will be immediately put to work building a campaign that can win not just the primary, but the general election, too.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28486?refcode=em20210823-2374&t=24&akid=2374%2E434096%2EaDOtkO)
**[Donate $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28486?refcode=em20210823-2374&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=43&akid=2374%2E434096%2EaDOtkO)**
Thank you, 🙏
Team Fetterman HQ
P.S. Not only is John in the lead in this primary, but he's also our *single best shot* at defeating the GOP front-runners in this race and successfully flipping this seat. **We know we're going to face a flood of attacks from Republicans as soon as they see John leading the Democratic field,**[**so please donate $5 or more if you can today.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/28486?refcode=em20210823-2374&t=44&akid=2374%2E434096%2EaDOtkO)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210823-2374-footer&t=45&refcode2=2374_434096_aDOtkO&akid=2374%2E434096%2EaDOtkO)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=47&akid=2374%2E434096%2EaDOtkO)

name: Mississippi Freedom Caucus
subject: Mississippi Says Stay at Home or go to Jail
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzU4OTExMTQyNjk4MTYzMTMxJmM9YThwOSZlPTAmYj02OTY5MTcyMTImZD1mM3g0aDZk.r8JPrmCvN4Umv_aiU7hAf1HIkbQnvqlUAwAvcn1mlEA)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
| Mississippi Says Stay at Home or go to Jail
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzU4OTExMTQyNjk4MTYzMTMxJmM9YThwOSZlPTAmYj02OTY5MTcyMjQmZD10MnQ5YzVs.AawqHNKmZdC7f69eZEwO-WbHmrZBS1DzSni8zi9RIj8)
---|---
##### August 23, 2021
On Friday, August 20 Mississippi state health officer Thomas Dobbs struck another blow against the people of Mississippi. A few weeks ago it was Dr. Dobbs calling anyone who disagreed with him “nazi monkeys” this time they are threatening to jail sick people.
While governors from states like Florida and Tennessee are standing against the politically motivated health-care bureaucrats, Mississippi is headed in a different direction. In a late Friday release Dobbs issued an executive order stating that “failure or refusal to obey” would be “punishable by a fine of $500.00 or imprisonment for six months or both”.
The order requires, “All persons residing in Mississippi must immediately home-isolate on first knowledge of infection with COVID-19.”
The order continues to say, “All persons, including fully vaccinated individuals, infected with COVID-19 must remain in the home or other appropriate residential location for 10 days from onset of illness (or 10 days from the date of a positive test for those who are asymptomatic)”.
It seems Mississippi is taking a lesson from the Biden administration that says if you don’t fall in-line with the political overlords you will be called names, brow-beat, fined and jailed.
In a year where Mississippi’s government has grown many times larger than ever before, where federal money has poured into the state by the billions and where government has ordered individuals locked into their homes, closed businesses and mandating healthcare choices, Mississippi is charging toward bigger government and less individual freedom with little to no resistance from its political “leaders”.
Welcome to the new world where politicians control every aspect of your life.

---
| | |
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Learn more about the Mississippi Freedom Caucus
---
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is founded by elected officials who believe in freedom and liberty for the people of Mississippi. We are the voice of citizens who want bold action to protect life, strengthen families, defend our constitutional rights, limit government, and revitalize personal and economic freedoms in the state of Mississippi.
| [Find out more](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzU4OTExMTQyNjk4MTYzMTMxJmM9YThwOSZlPTAmYj02OTY5MTcyMzkmZD10NnI3ejR0.5H8_uYa0Lgf7fbvvn7ziTHeX8PuSZHFwQHCMcyl5b3I)

subject: FWD: Biden Must Resign!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b8b8c06c02cb/join-us-tomorrow-morning-for-a-major-announcement-5632593?e=c2296cffff)
---
| | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=af0113ee18&e=c2296cffff)
---
| Dear Friend, I just wanted to re-up this petition from my team in the wake of Joe Biden’s recent **FAILURE** in Afghanistan! After he left our allies and American citizens in grave danger, and gutted our credibility in the process, **I’m calling for President Biden’s _IMMEDIATE RESIGNATION._**
---
| [SIGN THE JOE BIDEN RESIGNATION PETITION](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=cd9663a5fe&e=c2296cffff "SIGN THE JOE BIDEN RESIGNATION PETITION")
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=b1c5c4d7ba&e=c2296cffff)
---
| Through this horrific failure, Joe Biden has shown he is unfit to serve - _the blame for the chaos ongoing in Afghanistan rests squarely on his shoulders!_ I’m heart-broken that the same terror my family escaped when I was an infant is now set to plague millions of Afghans. **That’s why I hope you’ll join me today -**[**tell Joe Biden to resign!**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=045b3b4b59&e=c2296cffff)
---
| [SIGN HERE](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=84ea500c62&e=c2296cffff "SIGN HERE")
---
| Thank you for signing,
_Amanda Makki_
---
|
**\-----Begin forwarded message-----**
From: Amanda Makki <amandamakki@amndamakki.com>
Date: Mon, Aug 16, 2021 at 5:00 p.m.
Subject: Biden Must Resign

Friend, There’s one person to blame for the foreign policy and humanitarian **_CRISIS_** currently unfolding in Afghanistan - President Biden, who is asleep at the switch! Joe Biden’s complete failure to create a strategic plan for withdrawal has resulted in the current disaster that is _EMBARRASSING_ the country, and leaving our own in harm’s way... **We can’t accept this from the President of the United States - he has gutted American credibility, endangered Afghan families, and left Americans on the ground in Afghanistan in grave danger.**[**This is a failure that calls for President Biden’s IMMEDIATE RESIGNATION!**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=8e237ce5d6&e=c2296cffff)

**Will you sign on to the petition below if you agree?**
---
| [SIGN HERE: PRESIDENT BIDEN MUST RESIGN](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=1a423f2510&e=c2296cffff "SIGN HERE: PRESIDENT BIDEN MUST RESIGN")
---
| I have personal experience with the horror that’s ongoing in Afghanistan. My parents fled to escape the Islamic reign of terror engulfing Iran - the same terror that millions of Afghan families now face as a result of the Biden administration’s complete failure! That’s why I know that these serious failures call for serious consequences - **President Biden must immediately resign for this horrific failure!** [**Sign on today to make your voice heard - we no longer have to accept this failed leadership!**](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=af1208b64c&e=c2296cffff)
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME: CALL FOR BIDEN'S RESIGNATION](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=972158bf39&e=c2296cffff "ADD YOUR NAME: CALL FOR BIDEN'S RESIGNATION")
---
| Thank you for speaking out,
_Amanda Makki_

body:
They are NOT our babysitters

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=009edc4fe41c41bc9e669907ddb78912&_e=VLZaJtum_nu5d-emUTsurP3HyhId2qKxBQa9DgNDHWNwGVu08AT0PJkiVBzea6DKnT8ZbYr8dJNfazo7fpqTyPOpofo_KI08DjlpjdebMYsRDbps3ZX8O5nBSFkg29suO1vZpDj8HIXdL2WDTOEQ2pZfK7GlkenAQDKHz4TFmlQhRNo5g7kSni0wRbNp4-vy5PrT1jYWwGOhVAkmfRxegcILHfsMIPLjzvRFQvBmTj-uJspqyZRnw-lKweKyVUSsNoxXGR08ox6YvOYRnTmhRESM0a5zpE4x74XKinQJRnMPFZtHofGkv_Sda5T9uX-a1FOknkZcNQ1pb42AS2sgG3_wRCfzCdDYKBga5mXwFkEfbAeqjiIU0z9WZQhrJ1rFRdBX8Qp4N_udPv6Rb61LwBn6KA7Js9hsz8ma69pEiWlHXKL4Qa3pJa4sXRgB6MFycS_JbLM1qSt-fqjW8594sku82tGv__CZGZ_D8PDVz8Fo_BNxytQ4FKXcYYjGA3bCUlYEzSu9tXcdSZFt8LT3lQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend,

**_I refuse to allow the Radical Left to force my constituents to co-parent their children with the government, and neither should you._**
| [**DONATE TO TAKE BACK YOUR FREEDOM!**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=009edc4fe41c41bc9e669907ddb78912&_e=VLZaJtum_nu5d-emUTsurP3HyhId2qKxBQa9DgNDHWNwGVu08AT0PJkiVBzea6DKnT8ZbYr8dJNfazo7fpqTyPOpofo_KI08DjlpjdebMYsRDbps3ZX8O5nBSFkg29suO1vZpDj8HIXdL2WDTOEQ2pZfK7GlkenAQDKHz4TFmlQhRNo5g7kSni0wRbNp4-vy5PrT1jYWwGOhVAkmfRxegcILHfsMIPLjzvRFQvBmTj-uJspqyZRnw-lKweKyVUSsNoxXGR08ox6YvOYRnTmhRESM0a5zpE4x74XKinQJRnMPFZtHofGkv_Sda5T9uX-auM8uPMvH-SNfJwRb7qrNwaVjfLiUNy9QHRm_BE-ZpUNWUal136x3NCihRcRuvTK3psSpzQ_LIebxy6wbky4frjO_jlJPfJ88ERzCjlY2ZIs05EmiJxfk5SY2YgJaXg2_s4VAriVlT4FRZfIm5TcfdzJ9cU-ZfkB9aAAoMzbFkAJ7TPe-aIpwEERgdLS0KnyxHYYv9mAnf0nDpAeEiGF7Dg%3D%3D)
---

The amount of control that the Biden Administration and Nancy Pelosi want over your family is terrifying. What's even scarier is how much power they’ve gotten away with taking from the American people.

**_It’s time for us to stand up to Biden and Pelosi and take our power back!_**

They tried to steal my election and they will try it again. Nancy Pelosi will do ANYTHING she needs to if it means more power for her and her cronies.

I’m running for re-election because I want to stand up for the American People, and accomplish all of the work that we have left to do. It is time that we all start to demand accountability from the government, firing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker of the House is the first step.

We have to amp up our efforts at Taking Back the House, and we have to do it now!

[**Can you chip in to support our campaign to Take Back The House?**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=009edc4fe41c41bc9e669907ddb78912&_e=VLZaJtum_nu5d-emUTsurP3HyhId2qKxBQa9DgNDHWNwGVu08AT0PJkiVBzea6DKnT8ZbYr8dJNfazo7fpqTyPOpofo_KI08DjlpjdebMYsRDbps3ZX8O5nBSFkg29suO1vZpDj8HIXdL2WDTOEQ2pZfK7GlkenAQDKHz4TFmlQhRNo5g7kSni0wRbNp4-vy5PrT1jYWwGOhVAkmfRxegcILHfsMIPLjzvRFQvBmTj-uJspqyZRnw-lKweKyVUSsNoxXGR08ox6YvOYRnTmhRESM0a5zpE4x74XKinQJRnMPFZtHofGkv_Sda5T9uX-a3qA64QCfjfIfUe9keHVQAW2CVIom2EyDPV0bfZzFhByEmcO-I1Gv5fmG91cDWWXtGxEh7TyXhzoET_8u04EmeqNZD9keoE8eTBw6LnkW0bgCxXNjiqmRLcge5PcItZpdYDxgviG_XORhXB77FC1Jbov9EoJKNaO160QUfLLwWh5WZU-kE9TwkZXUGE1a3w7Vu8sZ1a0zzIdrvIh026o1Pw%3D%3D)

God Bless,

[](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=009edc4fe41c41bc9e669907ddb78912&_e=VLZaJtum_nu5d-emUTsurP3HyhId2qKxBQa9DgNDHWNwGVu08AT0PJkiVBzea6DKnT8ZbYr8dJNfazo7fpqTyPOpofo_KI08DjlpjdebMYsRDbps3ZX8O5nBSFkg29suO1vZpDj8HIXdL2WDTOEQ2pZfK7GlkenAQDKHz4TFmlQhRNo5g7kSni0wRbNp4-vy5PrT1jYWwGOhVAkmfRxegcILHfsMIPLjzvRFQvBmTj-uJspqyZRnw-lKweKyVUSsNoxXGR08ox6YvOYRnTmhRESM0a5zpE4x74XKinQJRnMPFZtHofGkv_Sda5T9uX-ahfGvxSat4BjVl2A0KFI_NsWQLu6QD1to5hidHFIIxn0yCEV3ggUDQtKX6nRcIEuEufTyLXoHX_sxNSgmw5uYi8kK_dUWCTpkbPS4eZkeKjpIaiuI51XFCU4bZgyd6aaNjdgRrZEsZZA2afza-bYZ7PopfswaBxxXwszmAdTsgfsbLaAc4n9erCLjdPgvhISeFVDFTtsmYUE7hDFAvArlnQ%3D%3D)

name: Drew Thompson
subject: Last Chance to RSVP!
body:
Join Jane this Friday & Saturday [](https://) **An incredible week is upon us!** Peter, This Friday, is the start of a huge weekend of events with Jane Timken as we kick off our _Women for Jane_ coalition with conservative leaders from around the great state of Ohio. Considering Jane will be the **first woman to ever represent the Buckeye state** in the U.S. Senate, this is not an event that you will want to miss! Saturday will bring an opportunity to thank Columbus and Youngstown law enforcement as our team hosts Back the Blue BBQ's with former NYC Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik. clean_body: Join Jane this Friday & Saturday https:// An incredible week is upon us! Peter, This Friday, is the start of a huge weekend of events with Jane Timken as we kick off our Women for Jane coalition with conservative leaders from around the great state of Ohio. Considering Jane will be the first woman to ever represent the Buckeye state in the U.S. Senate, this is not an event that you will want to miss! Saturday will bring an opportunity to thank Columbus and Youngstown law enforcement as our team hosts Back the Blue BBQ's with former NYC Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik. Join Jane and Bernie, bring a police officer, and come show your appreciation with our team this weekend! Sign up for all 3 events below. Women for Jane Kick Off Date: August 27th Time: 11:30AM Location: Bridgewater Banquet and Conference Center, 10561 Sawmill Parkway, Powell, OH 43065 Sign Up: Timken Backs the Blue BBQ with NYC Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik Date: August 28th Time: 11:30AM Location: Timken HQ. 921 Chatham Ln Columbus, OH 43221 Sign up: Eventbrite: JTFO Intern & Volunteer Rally with NYC Police Commissioner Bernie Kerik Date: August 28th Time: 4:30PM Location: Mahoning County GOP HQ. 8381 Market St, Boardman, OH 44512 Sign up: Eventbrite: See you soon, -Jane Timken for Ohio Don't want to receive our emails anymore? | | | ---|---

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Legislature Tries to Save Newsom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [A Wave Election](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooM53pdCO481vJaZ8nXG4PcElHR_aN8djq3WVEkc0qt-g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_23&n=1) The Legislature is only in session three more weeks. Yet it’s cancelling oversight hearings on wildfires and the EDD. Stopping bad press for Gavin Newsom is apparently more important than stopping fires and fraud. Legislators are as desperate as Newsom to stop the Recall. The one thing they respond to is the fear of losing their jobs. If the Governor loses his job, they know it will be a whole new ball game. As Governor, after ending the State of Emergency and all mandates, I’d present the Legislature with a choice: work with me to reverse California’s decline, or face the same fate as Newsom in next year's election. It would be a wave election. On Saturday I had events in liberal Santa Cruz and conservative Bakersfield, and enthusiasm was off the charts at both. Gavin Newsom is bringing our state together. Finally, I was honored that Ken, from the legendary John and Ken show with 1.2 million weekly listeners, shared on the air that I’d received his vote, saying, “We desperately need a new generation.” [Help lift our campaign to the top](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7PyukeanaPVVByy4cGnphLXxOEH1CWIcHtuMj2-9EAmrlzX4&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_23&n=2) [Share this post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAxzCy00zY9pgjTxl30BcCps6RDFV0J3bh2RAUfNHhCMjQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_23&n=3) Kevin Kiley
[KileyForCalifornia.com](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_23&n=4)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Governor 2021 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_aug_23&n=5).

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Federal Court Orders Deposition of Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot’s Office Representative in Lawsuit against Racist Interview Policy
body:
Judicial Watch announced recently that a federal court ordered the deposition of a representative of Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot’s office in a lawsuit over her discriminatory interview policy. The court granted the request for discovery during a hearing this morning. In doing so, the court rejected arguments by the mayor’s lawyers against discovery and to dismiss the legal challenge.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Aug 23, 2021
---|---|---

The court granted the request for discovery during a hearing this morning. In doing so, the court rejected arguments by the mayor’s lawyers against discovery and to dismiss the legal challenge. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56487&L=25655&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvbGlnaHRmb290LXJhY2lzdC1pbnRlcnZpZXctcG9saWN5Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA4MjMyMjM5NTE=)

The Pelosi Congress is in cover-up mode regarding January 6.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56487&L=25651&F=H&)

| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56487&L=25650&F=H&) | **[U.S. Wastes Nearly $1 Trillion on Afghanistan Reconstruction, Biden to Send $3.3 Billion More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56487&L=25650&F=H&)** In two decades of failed Afghanistan reconstruction efforts the U.S. government has spent almost a trillion dollars and President Joe Biden wants to dedicate billions more in the aftermath of his disastrous withdraw from the terrorist nation. Judicial Watch has reported extensively on the pervasive waste, fraud and corruption that has long plagued the failed U.S. nation building project in Afghanistan which has seen an exorbitant flow of cash under both Democrat and Republican administrations. To compensate for the absence of American troops, Biden wants to throw in another $3.3 billion on the way out, a $300 million increase over last year, incorporated in the 2022 defense budget. Zachor made two requests under the Texas Public Information Act for information about the funding or donations made to Texas A&M; by the government of Qatar and agencies and subdivisions of the government of Qatar. Qatar controversially has aligned itself with Islamic terrorists and extremists, which has placed it at odds with the United States, Israel and other U.S. allies in the Middle East. Hundreds of thousands of migrants arrive from scores of countries, probably unvaccinated, definitely at risk and about half the time already infected with the disease. They are then sent throughout the country as disease vectors for whatever variety of the contagion they have, known or unknown. “Whatever variants are around the world, they’re coming across that southern border,” DeSantis said. He noted that the president is “not shutting down the virus, he’s helping to facilitate it in our country.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56487&L=25657&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kYWlseWNhbGxlci5jb20vMjAyMS8wOC8xMi9mYXJyZWxsLXRoZS1ib3JkZXItY3Jpc2lzLWNvdmlkLXNwaWtlLWNvbm5lY3Rpb24vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDgyMzIyMzk1MQ==)

Journalists challenged the Washington, D.C. medical examiner's office regarding its finding that Sicknick in fact died of natural causes, according to those records. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=56487&L=25658&F=H&)

name: =?utf-8?b?8J+UtA==?= LIVE: Biden Harris Approval Poll
subject: POLITICO BREAKING (via unitedemocrats.org)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC

clean_body: | = My name is Alex Freedman, the campaign manager determined to elect proven community leader Eric Gash and take down Republican Madison Cawthorn. But I woke up to some terrible news that could jeopardize our campaign just as it's getting off the ground: Grassroots donations are grinding to a halt. Here’s a live look at ActBlue: = | = If donations keep slowing down, I’m afraid we won’t have the momentum to seize this moment and give Western North Carolina the people-first leader it deserves. But if a surge of support responds to this plea -- 1,000 grassroots Democrats strong \-- we’ll be in the best possible position to compete with Cawthorn. It’s going to be the fight of our lives to dethrone the far-right’s darling, Madison Cawthorn, but Eric and I have faith in the strength of this grassroots movement. We know we can rely on good Democrats like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Alex | | Paid for by Eric Gash For Congress PO Box 543, Hendersonville, NC 28793 www.ericgash.com Eric Gash is a teacher, a pastor, a former professional football player, and former Hendersonville High School football coach. He is running for Congress against MAGA Republican Rep. Madison Cawthorn. Cawthorn is an utter failure for the working families he represents, and is more focused on serving himself and the MAGA base than the good people of this district. Friend,

Did you watch Joe Biden's address to the Nation about his failure in Afghanistan? So many things were just...wrong.

Biden blames everyone else but himself - including my father who did nothing wrong. I'd say it's **unbelievable ...** _but it 's actually not at all unbelievable, unfortunately._

If the first 7 months have been THIS BAD, imagine what Biden can do with the remaining 3.5 years of his presidency. **It 's time for Joe Biden to resign. If this disaster occured under my father, every Democrat and fake news reporter in the country would be calling for the 25th Amendment.

Maybe it should be used on Joe?

One thing is for certain though, he is not fit to be OUR President, and something must be done. **

Biden blames everyone else but himself - including my father who did nothing wrong. I'd say it's unbelievable ... but it 's actually not at all unbelievable, unfortunately. If the first 7 months have been THIS BAD, imagine what Biden can do with the remaining 3.5 years of his presidency. It 's time for Joe Biden to resign. If this disaster occured under my father, every Democrat and fake news reporter in the country would be calling for the 25th Amendment. Maybe it should be used on Joe? One thing is for certain though, he is not fit to be OUR President, and something must be done. You can INCREASE your impact by 300% when you step up NOW. Joe Biden didn't take any questions at his press conference because he's not capable of it. If you watched him struggle through the speech, you could see it in his eyes: there's nothing behind them, no one is home, and it's likely that he took days off just to be able to muster the energy to get through that BS. I'm going to call my father with the list of patriots who called for Biden's resignation - can I tell him you stepped up? Thank you, Donald Trump Jr. Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: John Castorani
subject: September 11th, 2012 changed my life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97734e1fd9e84135814c067577cd71f9&_e=GEpWUxSFiAMBqY9U31hbK-HaAPK1BPv9ydmjU-x0mw1Xnmw37IdRouEymVmU5iid3PHfFf_LLtt3U2HCuYC5rapi-1QnAwV1tABYQCw6HQwsQKzU-SjfgGNspUpjkgxbHgXis6uTxqPth9KzKQGenvZK5aXFd1mRZgzAJn_2AhK2nA8S9o0_L9CJtV-sA5-T0lsiD-gPfjP6AUGZoKiFfrCxgzUTxfcAXncVT40UI3ml86n1CYW9FSajaQ4p8Sn0FXoZZODBvTjA80Skz_UWjR2BCqV7zJ3zXtAq2u0rTr18DsxpTtaAVXQ7qabT8Q3SUPvYWS9TbICWoAmSXabKf-jGJEXlisb0n5yeKOwWofM7d6UKD_AO7dV4Un_Stbket-MYTs4fSwrbmDRX-pCALnqCoNc05q5TI2nQzkb86g7FMZ1WcdziMs5encEFWHrhKck5GuoVJemogwrevMN4SnQK0D4djj4h-IRREyq-df8%3D)
---

Fellow Conservative,

**Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division** ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party.

My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this!

**Here’s my elevator pitch to you** : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign.

**September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever**. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97734e1fd9e84135814c067577cd71f9&_e=GEpWUxSFiAMBqY9U31hbK-HaAPK1BPv9ydmjU-x0mw1Xnmw37IdRouEymVmU5iid3PHfFf_LLtt3U2HCuYC5rapi-1QnAwV1tABYQCw6HQwsQKzU-SjfgGNspUpjkgxbHgXis6uTxqPth9KzKQGenvZK5aXFd1mRZgzAJn_2AhK2nA8S9o0_L9CJtV-sA5-T0lsiD-gPfjP6AUGZoKiFfrCxgzUTxfcAXncVT40UI3ml86n1CYW9FSajaQ4p8Sn0AVQQk37yJhpF4znDcAdQr1_LQYy-HJMLRcAGKObmJlclhTDJbaoWECD21Yc7lzXS5Wzp3MJM9hy_2mqBP7hrCD-ecCDxb1gnUmGgKnnyh7BqgVVRCx5Zv6t_OJy3bioyVjZHh92knN-etiCetMMeH5mIfusktnfzzNrz8ZigYBtFrW0zSbYFrC_EijTTmAPGrOS00nmFIHDz61hFx5F_hAykjocIisGqrhYt1eNqCW8%3D)

I’m the man I am today because ISIS (**Islamic State**) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, **I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks**. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012.

I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a **CIA conference** focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting **SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services** , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country.

| [**SEND A FIGHTER TO CONGRESS
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97734e1fd9e84135814c067577cd71f9&_e=GEpWUxSFiAMBqY9U31hbK-HaAPK1BPv9ydmjU-x0mw1Xnmw37IdRouEymVmU5iid3PHfFf_LLtt3U2HCuYC5rapi-1QnAwV1tABYQCw6HQwsQKzU-SjfgGNspUpjkgxbHgXis6uTxqPth9KzKQGenvZK5aXFd1mRZgzAJn_2AhK2nA8S9o0_L9CJtV-sA5-T0lsiD-gPfjP6AUGZoKiFfrCxgzUTxfcAXncVT40UI3ml86n1CYW9FSajaQ4p8Sn0tDBxkz2nknLgrLOro_GCUrCu0KEn7e5jsdwdu-QsQoQGP3eu3fCkAYfo07se68ZquJanseWXzWqNtvL0g4ImFGbiCfj-jA4bA-1EXmzw5Wv1JAZsH56t7kSyQ5e0yQB361h-s04P-YSm1tMF1_T49KrgOMx2PgDLIqWQNTgOKl6lVGRo6KZjbk8lCY1qzWUjDKfoGa3TAF33zIqP1JEQzvY5nEI5cvJxo0E_KhQ0T5U%3D)
---

We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. **But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands**. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great.

I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. **The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us!**

**I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas.**

**Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills.**

But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us. I can’t stomach it anymore, so I’m running for Congress because actions really do speak louder than words. **[I’m asking for you to help me make sure that this endeavor isn’t in vain by making a gift to my campaign today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97734e1fd9e84135814c067577cd71f9&_e=GEpWUxSFiAMBqY9U31hbK-HaAPK1BPv9ydmjU-x0mw1Xnmw37IdRouEymVmU5iid3PHfFf_LLtt3U2HCuYC5rapi-1QnAwV1tABYQCw6HQwsQKzU-SjfgGNspUpjkgxbHgXis6uTxqPth9KzKQGenvZK5aXFd1mRZgzAJn_2AhK2nA8S9o0_L9CJtV-sA5-T0lsiD-gPfjP6AUGZoKiFfrCxgzUTxfcAXncVT40UI3ml86n1CYW9FSajaQ4p8Sn06hVGgEOCbTwzlXJ9ebNXd7HqvXIOMlOwx3QSmg1HXF2AQd4y2lZfTMMN7EDSi42FNlCHQzFxq_c7yTyTb6h-h3wDr07Hjyrb1-tNiuMoD6-61uE2VluyY3GPAjPXIaM-9MWiNLvHX6OKAbJbr7j66SISOBb-FBl3sSj1OT_aDMvn4pxu8qTxWaJurPCZY6-4m053RTHWpDhVgt1JNZg9vkH5Lgi60h2MzwRTXf10QhI%3D)**.

In the military, we are taught to complete the mission, no matter what - regardless of your race, religion, ethnicity or creed. In the military, lives are literally on the line when people don’t work as a team. Clearly, members of Congress today aren’t following the example set by members of the American armed forces.

**It's time that we the people demand better because we deserve better, we have the ability to dictate who governs us and in 2022 we will do just that.**

**[Won’t you join me on this mission by making a gift of $5, $25 or even $50 today?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=97734e1fd9e84135814c067577cd71f9&_e=GEpWUxSFiAMBqY9U31hbK-HaAPK1BPv9ydmjU-x0mw1Xnmw37IdRouEymVmU5iid3PHfFf_LLtt3U2HCuYC5rapi-1QnAwV1tABYQCw6HQwsQKzU-SjfgGNspUpjkgxbHgXis6uTxqPth9KzKQGenvZK5aXFd1mRZgzAJn_2AhK2nA8S9o0_L9CJtV-sA5-T0lsiD-gPfjP6AUGZoKiFfrCxgzUTxfcAXncVT40UI3ml86n1CYW9FSajaQ4p8Sn0gOqJ_5DGpc78XJIENgSm_n-o83KbZLcE05rMfp9p7CkR4RJ-yqS69V9RUw5brNTasZdL8ou8SdYyY4nkRmf6zBlv6BtTbtsG-_0XTO03WtrO5X9x_eUWEnrW1VX0u0--AkYFQ5xysjT8uTxOR4wT7XmoVPP00s4Sdt5vtMeRe9lqE9P7T3AN2HILog74MC7kPqVWyLNTY8sU1mCl6psZGPOlbeW4_ygwlyEhZAoT2gY%3D)**

Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. | Fellow Conservative, Congress has become incompetent and ineffective due to political infighting and deep division ; elected officials are no longer able to legislate for the American people; members of congress are unable to put the American people before their political party. My name is John Castorani and right now I’m asking you for just a few minutes of your time. If your inbox is anything like mine, then I’m already lucky that you opened this! Here’s my elevator pitch to you : I need you to know my background, why I’m running for Congress and what kind of man I am because in a moment I’m going to ask you to invest in my congressional campaign. September 11th, 2012 changed my life forever. Not only was it the evening that Islamic terrorists raided the American compound in Benghazi, Libya - leaving an American ambassador dead in their wake - it set in motion a series of events that led me to emailing you today about why I’m running for public office. I’m the man I am today because ISIS (Islamic State) thugs decided it was a good idea to terrorize an American outpost in the African desert. You see, I joined the Army and made it my mission to destroy the bastards following the Benghazi terror attacks. Over the course of nine years, I deployed 7 times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting down every last one of the cowards who murdered four Americans on the night of September 11th, 2012. I had no clue the decision to help eliminate threats to your family and my own would result in me meeting my wife, Krissy, at a CIA conference focused on annihilating Islamic extremists on the Arabian Peninsula. Together, we first deployed to the Horn of Africa supporting SEAL Team 6, along with British and American Intelligence Services , working to dismantle Islamic State in Somalia. There, my wife Krissy and I were a part of the team which successfully targeted and neutralized the highest-ranking member in that country. | We’ve lived an amazing life in our short years. But now that we’re new parents, we’ve had to stop fighting terrorists in foreign lands. But my love for this country runs deep, and I can’t just sit at a desk working a 9-5 job while Joe Biden and Kamala Harris undo everything that’s made America great. I’m running for Congress because this is the greatest nation in HISTORY, and I owe my entire life and livelihood to this wonderful country. The far left’s agenda doesn’t sit right with me. I didn’t serve my country honorably to come home to a government that fails to represent us! I met my beautiful wife while defending our American way of life overseas. Our home is secured with a VA home loan; our colleges paid for through the GI Bills. But radical hyper partisan politicians continue to divide us.
